```{r}
  )[ , c("contrast","OR","LCL","UCL","p.value")]
  cat("\nPairwise odds ratios (logit link):\n"); print(OR_tab, row.names = FALSE)
}

cat("\nCoefficient names:\n"); print(names(coef(best_gee_model)))


```




4.Heatwave Sweating LGME (RIS)
```{r,eval=FALSE}
## ============================
## GLMM selector for Sweating (T1/T2/T3 coding)
## ============================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(splines)
  library(emmeans)   # optional; for pairwise phase contrasts if factor-time wins
})

## ---------- Prep ----------
stopifnot(all(c("Sweating","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long)))

# Ensure binary 0/1 and drop unused levels
dat_long$Sweating <- as.integer(dat_long$Sweating)
dat_long <- droplevels(dat_long)

# Phase as UNordered factor (no polynomial coding), T1 is reference
dat_long$phase <- factor(dat_long$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)

# Force treatment contrasts globally (fixed & random parts)
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))

# Be tolerant to either grouped or raw names for these covariates
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(dat_long)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(dat_long)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# Numeric time encodings (for linear/quadratic candidate models)
dat_long$phase_num   <- as.numeric(dat_long$phase) - 1            # 0,1,2 with T1=0
dat_long$phase_num_c <- scale(dat_long$phase_num, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)

# Controls
ctrl_RI  <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))
ctrl_RIS <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 5e5))

## ---------- Step 1: RI vs RIS using factor time ----------
form_RI_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Sweating ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_sweating <- glmer(form_RI_factor, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# With treatment contrasts, (phase | ID) uses dummy slopes for T2, T3 (ref = T1) — no L/Q
form_RIS_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Sweating ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (phase | ID)")
)
fit_RIS_sweating <- glmer(form_RIS_factor, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 1, control = ctrl_RIS)

aic_random <- AIC(fit_RI_sweating, fit_RIS_sweating)
print(aic_random)

best_random <- if (aic_random$AIC[1] <= aic_random$AIC[2]) "RI" else "RIS"
cat("\n>> Best random structure by AIC:", best_random, "\n")

## ---------- Step 2: Within chosen random structure, compare time effects (FACTOR, LINEAR, QUADRATIC) ----------
if (best_random == "RI") {
  # (A) Factor (response-profile) under RI
  fit_factor <- fit_RI_sweating

  # (B) Linear time under RI
  form_RI_linear <- as.formula(
    paste0("Sweating ~ phase_num + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
           " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
  )
  fit_linear <- glmer(form_RI_linear, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

  # (C) Quadratic time under RI
  form_RI_quad <- as.formula(
    paste0("Sweating ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
           " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
  )
  fit_quadratic <- glmer(form_RI_quad, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

} else {  # ------ RIS branch: TEST ALL THREE (factor, linear, quadratic) ------

  # (A) Factor time with random slopes for phase dummies (ref = T1)
  form_RIS_factor <- as.formula(
    paste0("Sweating ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
           " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (phase | ID)")
  )
  fit_RIS_factor <- glmer(form_RIS_factor, family = binomial, data = dat_long,
                          nAGQ = 1, control = ctrl_RIS)

  # (B) Linear time with random slope on linear time
  form_RIS_linear <- as.formula(
    paste0("Sweating ~ phase_num + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
           " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (phase_num | ID)")
  )
  fit_RIS_linear <- glmer(form_RIS_linear, family = binomial, data = dat_long,
                          nAGQ = 1, control = ctrl_RIS)

  # (C) Quadratic time: random slope for the linear component only (more stable)
  form_RIS_quad <- as.formula(
    paste0("Sweating ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
           " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (phase_num_c | ID)")
  )
  fit_RIS_quadratic <- glmer(form_RIS_quad, family = binomial, data = dat_long,
                             nAGQ = 1, control = ctrl_RIS)

  # Align names to selector variables
  fit_factor    <- fit_RIS_factor
  fit_linear    <- fit_RIS_linear
  fit_quadratic <- fit_RIS_quadratic
}

# AIC table & choose best time specification (three models compared)
aic_time <- data.frame(
  TimeSpec = c("factor","linear","quadratic"),
  AIC      = c(AIC(fit_factor), AIC(fit_linear), AIC(fit_quadratic))
)
aic_time <- aic_time[order(aic_time$AIC), ]
cat("\n>> Time-effect AICs within chosen random structure:\n"); print(aic_time)

best_timespec <- aic_time$TimeSpec[1]
best_glmm <- switch(best_timespec,
  factor    = fit_factor,
  linear    = fit_linear,
  quadratic = fit_quadratic
)

cat("\n================ BEST GLMM (by AIC) ================\n")
cat("Random structure:", best_random, "\n")
cat("Time specification:", best_timespec, "\n")
cat("AIC:", AIC(best_glmm), "\n\n")
print(summary(best_glmm))

## ---------- Optional: pairwise phase contrasts if factor-time won ----------
if (best_timespec == "factor") {
  cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) with Holm adjust:\n")
  emm <- emmeans(best_glmm, ~ phase)
  print(pairs(emm, adjust = "holm"))
}

## (Optional) restore previous contrast settings
options(op_old)

```


4.Heatwave Sweating LGME (RIS)
```{r,eval=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(performance))

# Use the SELECTED Sweating GLMM from your selector step
# (assumes `best_glmm` points to the Sweating winner)
assess_sweating <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  best_glmm,
  data = dat_long,
  do_plots = TRUE,        # show diagnostic plots
  do_sensitivity = TRUE   # optimizer/integration robustness
)

# Quick summary
assess_sweating$overall_ok
assess_sweating$sensitivity$agreement

```



4.Heatwave Sweating LGME (RI Force)
```{r}
# ============================
# RI-only GLMM — Sweating (heatwave, dat_long)
# - Fit RI only
# - Compare AIC for factor/linear/quadratic time
# - ALWAYS report factor time model
# ============================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(emmeans)      # pairwise contrasts
  library(performance)  # check_glmm_assumptions()
})

## --- Prep ---
stopifnot(all(c("Sweating","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long)))

# Robust 0/1 coercion
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Sweating must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (any(is.na(out))) stop("Unrecognized Sweating values.")
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Sweating type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d <- dat_long
d$Sweating <- to01(d$Sweating)

# Phase as categorical T1/T2/T3 (T1 baseline)
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))

# Flexible columns for family size & income
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(d)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(d)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# Numeric encodings for time (for linear/quadratic candidates)
d$phase_num   <- as.numeric(d$phase) - 1               # 0,1,2
d$phase_num_c <- scale(d$phase_num, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)

ctrl_RI <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))

## --- RI models with different time effects ---

# 1) Factor time (response profile: T2/T3 vs T1)
form_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Sweating ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_factor <- glmer(form_factor, family = binomial, data = d,
                    nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# 2) Linear time
form_linear <- as.formula(
  paste0("Sweating ~ phase_num + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_linear <- glmer(form_linear, family = binomial, data = d,
                    nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# 3) Quadratic time
form_quad <- as.formula(
  paste0("Sweating ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_quad <- glmer(form_quad, family = binomial, data = d,
                  nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

## --- AIC comparison (info only) ---
cat("\n=== AIC: RI time specifications (Sweating) ===\n")
aic_tab <- data.frame(
  TimeSpec = c("factor","linear","quadratic"),
  AIC      = c(AIC(fit_factor), AIC(fit_linear), AIC(fit_quad))
)
print(aic_tab[order(aic_tab$AIC), ])

## --- Forced selection: ALWAYS factor model ---
best_timespec <- "factor"
best_glmm_RI  <- fit_factor
cat("\n>> Reporting RI + FACTOR time model (Sweating)\n")

## --- Assumptions ---
assess_RI <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  best_glmm_RI,
  data = d,
  do_plots = TRUE,
  do_sensitivity = TRUE
)
cat("\nAssumption check — overall OK? ", assess_RI$overall_ok, "\n")
cat("Sensitivity agreement (GLM-CRSE, GEE):\n")
print(assess_RI$sensitivity$agreement)

## --- Summary ---
cat("\n=== Summary of the selected RI model (Sweating) ===\n")
print(summary(best_glmm_RI))

## --- Pairwise phase contrasts (always, since factor selected) ---
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (log-odds), Holm-adjusted:\n")
emm_fac <- emmeans(best_glmm_RI, ~ phase)
print(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"))

cat("\nSame contrasts as odds ratios (95% CI):\n")
print(summary(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"), type = "response", infer = c(TRUE, TRUE)))

## (Optional) restore previous contrast settings
options(op_old)

```













4.Heatwave Sweating GEE
```{r}
# ===========================
# GEE selection + assumptions (Sweating outcome) - T1/T2/T3 coding
# ===========================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(geepack); library(emmeans) })

# ---- 0) Clean & sort --------------------------------------------
vars <- c("Sweating","phase","Age_Group","Gender","Family_Size_Group",
          "Monthly_Income_Group","HH_Area","HTN_prior","Asthma_prior",
          "Thyroid_prior","CVDs_prior","ID")

d <- na.omit(dat_long[, vars])
d <- droplevels(d)


# Robust 0/1 coercion for the binary outcome
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Sweating must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (any(is.na(out))) {
      bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
      stop("Unrecognized Sweating levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
    }
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Sweating type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d$Sweating <- to01(d$Sweating)

# >>> Use treatment contrasts (T1 reference), NOT polynomial L/Q
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)
# options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.poly"))  # optional

# Sort so AR(1) can infer spacing by row order (if chosen)
d <- d[order(d$ID, d$phase), ]

# Common formula (same covariates as your GLMM)
form <- Sweating ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + Family_Size_Group + Monthly_Income_Group +
  HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior

# ---- 1) Fit grid: working correlation × link ---------------------
cor_opts <- c("independence","exchangeable","ar1","unstructured")
families <- list(
  logit   = stats::binomial(link = "logit"),
  probit  = stats::binomial(link = "probit"),
  cloglog = stats::binomial(link = "cloglog")
)

fits <- list(); rows <- list()
for (cc in cor_opts) {
  for (lname in names(families)) {
    fam <- families[[lname]]
    key <- paste(cc, lname, sep = "_")
    fit <- geeglm(form, id = ID, family = fam, corstr = cc, data = d)
    qic <- geepack::QIC(fit)
    fits[[key]] <- fit
    rows[[key]] <- data.frame(Correlation = cc, Link = lname,
                              QIC = unname(qic[["QIC"]]),
                              QICu = if (!is.null(qic[["QICu"]])) unname(qic[["QICu"]]) else NA_real_)
  }
}
sel_tab <- do.call(rbind, rows)
row.names(sel_tab) <- NULL
sel_tab <- sel_tab[order(sel_tab$QIC), ]
cat("\nModel selection grid (lower QIC is better):\n"); print(sel_tab)

best_idx  <- which.min(sel_tab$QIC)
best_cor  <- sel_tab$Correlation[best_idx]
best_link <- sel_tab$Link[best_idx]
fit_best  <- fits[[paste(best_cor, best_link, sep = "_")]]

cat("\nBest: correlation =", best_cor, ", link =", best_link,
    " (QIC =", round(sel_tab$QIC[best_idx], 3),
    if (!is.na(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx])) paste0(", QICu = ", round(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx], 3)) else "",
    ")\n")

# Save the selected model and show a summary
best_gee_model <- fit_best
summary(best_gee_model)

# ---- 2) Slide-style table (logit only) ---------------------------
if (!is.null(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])) {
  qic_log <- c(
    Unstructured              = geepack::QIC(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `Constant (Exchangeable)` = geepack::QIC(fits[["exchangeable_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `AR(1)`                   = geepack::QIC(fits[["ar1_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    Independence              = geepack::QIC(fits[["independence_logit"]])[["QIC"]]
  )
  pres_tab <- data.frame(Correlation = names(qic_log),
                         `QIC (logit)` = round(unname(qic_log), 1),
                         check.names = FALSE)
  cat("\nWorking correlation comparison (logit only):\n"); print(pres_tab)
}

# ---- 3) Diagnostics ----------------------------------------------
# 3a) Clusters & size
n_clusters <- length(unique(d$ID))
cat("\n# Clusters:", n_clusters, "\n")
cat("Cluster-size distribution:\n"); print(table(table(d$ID)))

# 3b) Within-ID variation for 'phase'
wcv <- tapply(d$phase, d$ID, function(x) length(unique(x)))
cat("Proportion of clusters with >1 phase level:", round(mean(wcv > 1), 3), "\n")

# 3c) Sparse cells / separation check for phase
tab_phase <- xtabs(~ Sweating + phase, data = d)
cat("\nContingency of Sweating by phase:\n"); print(tab_phase)

# 3d) Overdispersion (binomial quasi-likelihood)
phi <- sum(residuals(best_gee_model, type = "pearson")^2) / (nrow(d) - length(coef(best_gee_model)))
cat("\nPearson scale (phi):", round(phi, 3), " ( >1 suggests overdispersion )\n")

# 3e) Estimated working correlation
if (!is.null(best_gee_model$geese$alpha)) {
  cat("Estimated working correlation (alpha):", round(best_gee_model$geese$alpha, 3), "\n")
}

# 3f) Influence: leave-one-ID-out on first 'phase' term (T2 vs T1 coefficient)
phase_terms <- grep("^phase", names(coef(best_gee_model)), value = TRUE)
if (length(phase_terms) > 0) {
  target   <- phase_terms[1]   # typically "phaseT2" if T1 is reference
  base_est <- coef(best_gee_model)[target]
  ids <- unique(d$ID)
  set.seed(1)
  probe_ids <- if (length(ids) > 80) sample(ids, 80) else ids

  loo_delta <- sapply(probe_ids, function(i){
    dd <- d[d$ID != i, ]
    dd <- dd[order(dd$ID, dd$phase), ]
    fam_best <- families[[best_link]]
    fit_i <- geeglm(form, id = ID, family = fam_best, corstr = best_cor, data = dd)
    cf <- coef(fit_i); if (!target %in% names(cf)) return(NA_real_)
    cf[target] - base_est
  })
  infl_tab <- data.frame(ID = probe_ids, dBeta = loo_delta)
  infl_tab <- infl_tab[order(abs(infl_tab$dBeta), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  cat("\nTop 10 influential clusters for", target, "(|Δβ|):\n")
  print(head(infl_tab, 10), row.names = FALSE)
}

# ---- 4) Effects table with robust CIs ----------------------------
est <- coef(best_gee_model)
se  <- sqrt(diag(best_gee_model$geese$vbeta))     # robust (sandwich)
z   <- est / se
p   <- 2*pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE)

if (best_link == "logit") {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    OR  = round(exp(est), 3),
    LCL = round(exp(est - 1.96*se), 3),
    UCL = round(exp(est + 1.96*se), 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
} else {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    Estimate = round(est, 3),
    LCL = round(est - 1.96*se, 3),  # keep on link scale
    UCL = round(est + 1.96*se, 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    Link = best_link,
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
}
cat("\nPopulation-averaged effects for best GEE model (Sweating):\n"); print(OUT)

# ---- 5) Pairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) -----------
emm  <- emmeans(best_gee_model, ~ phase, vcov. = vcov(best_gee_model))   # robust vcov from GEE
cmp  <- pairs(emm, adjust = "holm")
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (", best_link, " link):\n", sep = ""); print(summary(cmp))

# Also show odds ratios if the chosen link is logit
if (best_link == "logit") {
  sc <- summary(cmp)
  OR_tab <- transform(sc,
    OR  = exp(estimate),
    LCL = exp(estimate - 1.96*SE),
    UCL = exp(estimate + 1.96*SE)
  )[ , c("contrast","OR","LCL","UCL","p.value")]
  cat("\nPairwise odds ratios (logit link):\n"); print(OR_tab, row.names = FALSE)
}

```



4.Heatwave Sweating GEE
```{r}
# From your selection step:
best_link <- "cloglog"
best_cor  <- "unstructured"

family_map <- list(
  logit   = binomial("logit"),
  probit  = binomial("probit"),
  cloglog = binomial("cloglog")
)

# Assumes you already have `d` defined and cleaned with Sweating as 0/1,
# and phase coded T1/T2/T3 with T1 as reference.

# Common formula (Sweating outcome)
form <- Sweating ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + Family_Size_Group + Monthly_Income_Group +
  HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior

best_gee_model <- geeglm(
  form,
  id     = ID,
  family = family_map[[best_link]],   # cloglog
  corstr = best_cor,                  # unstructured
  data   = d
)

summary(best_gee_model)

```



5.Heatwave Allergy LGME (RIS)
```{r,eval=FALSE}
## ============================
## GLMM selector for Allergy (T1/T2/T3 coding)
## ============================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(splines)
  library(emmeans)   # optional; for pairwise phase contrasts if factor-time wins
})

## ---------- Prep ----------
stopifnot(all(c("Allergy","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long)))

# Ensure binary 0/1 and drop unused levels
dat_long$Allergy <- as.integer(dat_long$Allergy)
dat_long <- droplevels(dat_long)

# Phase as UNordered factor (no polynomial coding), T1 is reference
dat_long$phase <- factor(dat_long$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)

# Force treatment contrasts globally (fixed & random parts)
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))

# Be tolerant to either grouped or raw names for these covariates
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(dat_long)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(dat_long)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# Numeric time encodings (for linear/quadratic candidate models)
dat_long$phase_num   <- as.numeric(dat_long$phase) - 1            # 0,1,2 with T1=0
dat_long$phase_num_c <- scale(dat_long$phase_num, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)

# Controls
ctrl_RI  <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))
ctrl_RIS <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 5e5))

## ---------- Step 1: RI vs RIS using factor time ----------
form_RI_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Allergy ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_allergy <- glmer(form_RI_factor, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# With treatment contrasts, (phase | ID) uses dummy slopes for T2, T3 (ref = T1) — no L/Q
form_RIS_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Allergy ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (phase | ID)")
)
fit_RIS_allergy <- glmer(form_RIS_factor, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 1, control = ctrl_RIS)

aic_random <- AIC(fit_RI_allergy, fit_RIS_allergy)
print(aic_random)

best_random <- if (aic_random$AIC[1] <= aic_random$AIC[2]) "RI" else "RIS"
cat("\n>> Best random structure by AIC:", best_random, "\n")

## ---------- Step 2: Within chosen random structure, compare time effects (FACTOR, LINEAR, QUADRATIC) ----------
if (best_random == "RI") {
  # (A) Factor (response-profile) under RI
  fit_factor <- fit_RI_allergy

  # (B) Linear time under RI
  form_RI_linear <- as.formula(
    paste0("Allergy ~ phase_num + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
           " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
  )
  fit_linear <- glmer(form_RI_linear, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

  # (C) Quadratic time under RI
  form_RI_quad <- as.formula(
    paste0("Allergy ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
           " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
  )
  fit_quadratic <- glmer(form_RI_quad, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

} else {  # ------ RIS branch: TEST ALL THREE (factor, linear, quadratic) ------

  # (A) Factor time with random slopes for phase dummies (ref = T1)
  form_RIS_factor <- as.formula(
    paste0("Allergy ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
           " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (phase | ID)")
  )
  fit_RIS_factor <- glmer(form_RIS_factor, family = binomial, data = dat_long,
                          nAGQ = 1, control = ctrl_RIS)

  # (B) Linear time with random slope on linear time
  form_RIS_linear <- as.formula(
    paste0("Allergy ~ phase_num + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
           " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (phase_num | ID)")
  )
  fit_RIS_linear <- glmer(form_RIS_linear, family = binomial, data = dat_long,
                          nAGQ = 1, control = ctrl_RIS)

  # (C) Quadratic time: random slope for the linear component only (more stable)
  form_RIS_quad <- as.formula(
    paste0("Allergy ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
           " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (phase_num_c | ID)")
  )
  fit_RIS_quadratic <- glmer(form_RIS_quad, family = binomial, data = dat_long,
                             nAGQ = 1, control = ctrl_RIS)

  # Align names to selector variables
  fit_factor    <- fit_RIS_factor
  fit_linear    <- fit_RIS_linear
  fit_quadratic <- fit_RIS_quadratic
}

# AIC table & choose best time specification (three models compared)
aic_time <- data.frame(
  TimeSpec = c("factor","linear","quadratic"),
  AIC      = c(AIC(fit_factor), AIC(fit_linear), AIC(fit_quadratic))
)
aic_time <- aic_time[order(aic_time$AIC), ]
cat("\n>> Time-effect AICs within chosen random structure:\n"); print(aic_time)

best_timespec <- aic_time$TimeSpec[1]
best_glmm <- switch(best_timespec,
  factor    = fit_factor,
  linear    = fit_linear,
  quadratic = fit_quadratic
)

cat("\n================ BEST GLMM (by AIC) ================\n")
cat("Random structure:", best_random, "\n")
cat("Time specification:", best_timespec, "\n")
cat("AIC:", AIC(best_glmm), "\n\n")
print(summary(best_glmm))

## ---------- Optional: pairwise phase contrasts if factor-time won ----------
if (best_timespec == "factor") {
  cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) with Holm adjust:\n")
  emm <- emmeans(best_glmm, ~ phase)
  print(pairs(emm, adjust = "holm"))
}

## (Optional) restore previous contrast settings
options(op_old)

```


5.Heatwave Allergy LGME (RIS)
```{r,eval=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(performance))

# Use the SELECTED Allergy GLMM from your selector step
# (assumes `best_glmm` points to the Allergy winner)
assess_allergy <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  best_glmm,
  data = dat_long,
  do_plots = TRUE,        # show diagnostic plots
  do_sensitivity = TRUE   # optimizer/integration robustness
)

# Quick summary
assess_allergy$overall_ok
assess_allergy$sensitivity$agreement

```


5.Heatwave Allergy LGME (RI_Force)
```{r}
# ============================
# RI-only GLMM — Allergy (heatwave, dat_long)
# - Fit RI only
# - Compare AIC for factor/linear/quadratic time
# - ALWAYS report factor time model
# ============================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(emmeans)      # pairwise contrasts
  library(performance)  # check_glmm_assumptions()
})

## --- Prep ---
stopifnot(all(c("Allergy","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long)))

# Robust 0/1 coercion
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Allergy must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (any(is.na(out))) stop("Unrecognized Allergy values.")
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Allergy type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d <- dat_long
d$Allergy <- to01(d$Allergy)

# Phase as categorical T1/T2/T3 (T1 baseline)
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))

# Flexible columns for family size & income
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(d)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(d)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# Numeric encodings for time (for linear/quadratic candidates)
d$phase_num   <- as.numeric(d$phase) - 1               # 0,1,2
d$phase_num_c <- scale(d$phase_num, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)

ctrl_RI <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))

## --- RI models with different time effects ---

# 1) Factor time (response profile: T2/T3 vs T1)
form_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Allergy ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_factor <- glmer(form_factor, family = binomial, data = d,
                    nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# 2) Linear time
form_linear <- as.formula(
  paste0("Allergy ~ phase_num + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_linear <- glmer(form_linear, family = binomial, data = d,
                    nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# 3) Quadratic time
form_quad <- as.formula(
  paste0("Allergy ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_quad <- glmer(form_quad, family = binomial, data = d,
                  nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

## --- AIC comparison (info only) ---
cat("\n=== AIC: RI time specifications (Allergy) ===\n")
aic_tab <- data.frame(
  TimeSpec = c("factor","linear","quadratic"),
  AIC      = c(AIC(fit_factor), AIC(fit_linear), AIC(fit_quad))
)
print(aic_tab[order(aic_tab$AIC), ])

## --- Forced selection: ALWAYS factor model ---
best_timespec <- "factor"
best_glmm_RI  <- fit_factor
cat("\n>> Reporting RI + FACTOR time model (Allergy)\n")

## --- Assumptions ---
assess_RI <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  best_glmm_RI,
  data = d,
  do_plots = TRUE,
  do_sensitivity = TRUE
)
cat("\nAssumption check — overall OK? ", assess_RI$overall_ok, "\n")
cat("Sensitivity agreement (GLM-CRSE, GEE):\n")
print(assess_RI$sensitivity$agreement)

## --- Summary ---
cat("\n=== Summary of the selected RI model (Allergy) ===\n")
print(summary(best_glmm_RI))

## --- Pairwise phase contrasts (always, since factor selected) ---
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (log-odds), Holm-adjusted:\n")
emm_fac <- emmeans(best_glmm_RI, ~ phase)
print(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"))

cat("\nSame contrasts as odds ratios (95% CI):\n")
print(summary(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"), type = "response", infer = c(TRUE, TRUE)))

## (Optional) restore previous contrast settings
options(op_old)

```



5.Heatwave Allergy GEE

```{r}
# ===========================
# GEE selection + assumptions (Allergy outcome) - T1/T2/T3 coding
# ===========================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(geepack); library(emmeans) })

# ---- 0) Clean & sort --------------------------------------------
# use HEATWAVE long data
base_df <- dat_long

# allow for grouped or raw versions of family size & income
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(base_df)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(base_df)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

vars <- c("Allergy","phase","Age_Group","Gender", fam_sz, inc,
          "HH_Area","HTN_prior","Asthma_prior","Thyroid_prior","CVDs_prior","ID")

d <- na.omit(base_df[, vars])
d <- droplevels(d)
stopifnot(!anyNA(d$ID))

# Robust 0/1 coercion for the binary outcome
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x)); if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Allergy must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (any(is.na(out))) {
      bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
      stop("Unrecognized Allergy levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
    }
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Allergy type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d$Allergy <- to01(d$Allergy)

# T1/T2/T3 treatment contrasts (no polynomial L/Q)
want_lvls <- c("T1","T2","T3")
if (!all(want_lvls %in% levels(d$phase))) {
  stop("phase must have levels T1, T2, T3; found: ", paste(levels(d$phase), collapse=", "))
}
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = want_lvls, ordered = FALSE)
contrasts(d$phase) <- stats::contr.treatment(n = length(levels(d$phase)), base = 1)

# AR(1) wave index + sort so spacing is by row order
d$wave <- as.integer(d$phase)  # T1=1, T2=2, T3=3
d <- d[order(d$ID, d$phase), ]

# Common formula (same covariates as your GLMM)
form <- as.formula(sprintf(
  "Allergy ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + %s + %s + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior",
  fam_sz, inc
))

# ---- 1) Fit grid: working correlation × link ---------------------
cor_opts <- c("independence","exchangeable","ar1","unstructured")
families <- list(
  logit   = stats::binomial(link = "logit"),
  probit  = stats::binomial(link = "probit"),
  cloglog = stats::binomial(link = "cloglog")
)

fits <- list(); rows <- list()
for (cc in cor_opts) {
  for (lname in names(families)) {
    fam <- families[[lname]]
    key <- paste(cc, lname, sep = "_")
    fit <- geeglm(form, id = ID, waves = wave, family = fam, corstr = cc, data = d)
    qic <- geepack::QIC(fit)
    fits[[key]] <- fit
    rows[[key]] <- data.frame(Correlation = cc, Link = lname,
                              QIC = unname(qic[["QIC"]]),
                              QICu = if (!is.null(qic[["QICu"]])) unname(qic[["QICu"]]) else NA_real_)
  }
}
sel_tab <- do.call(rbind, rows); row.names(sel_tab) <- NULL
sel_tab <- sel_tab[order(sel_tab$QIC), ]
cat("\nModel selection grid (lower QIC is better):\n"); print(sel_tab)

best_idx  <- which.min(sel_tab$QIC)
best_cor  <- sel_tab$Correlation[best_idx]
best_link <- sel_tab$Link[best_idx]
best_gee_model <- fits[[paste(best_cor, best_link, sep = "_")]]
cat("\nBest: correlation =", best_cor, ", link =", best_link,
    " (QIC =", round(sel_tab$QIC[best_idx], 3),
    if (!is.na(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx])) paste0(", QICu = ", round(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx], 3)) else "",
    ")\n")

# Full model summary
cat("\n=== Summary of the best GEE model (Allergy) ===\n")
print(summary(best_gee_model))

# ---- 2) Slide-style table (logit only) ---------------------------
if (!is.null(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])) {
  qic_log <- c(
    Unstructured              = geepack::QIC(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `Constant (Exchangeable)` = geepack::QIC(fits[["exchangeable_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `AR(1)`                   = geepack::QIC(fits[["ar1_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    Independence              = geepack::QIC(fits[["independence_logit"]])[["QIC"]]
  )
  pres_tab <- data.frame(Correlation = names(qic_log),
                         `QIC (logit)` = round(unname(qic_log), 1),
                         check.names = FALSE)
  cat("\nWorking correlation comparison (logit only):\n"); print(pres_tab)
}

# ---- 3) Diagnostics ----------------------------------------------
n_clusters <- length(unique(d$ID))
cat("\n# Clusters:", n_clusters, "\n")
cat("Cluster-size distribution:\n"); print(table(table(d$ID)))

wcv <- tapply(d$phase, d$ID, function(x) length(unique(x)))
cat("Proportion of clusters with >1 phase level:", round(mean(wcv > 1), 3), "\n")

tab_phase <- xtabs(~ Allergy + phase, data = d)
cat("\nContingency of Allergy by phase:\n"); print(tab_phase)
if (any(apply(tab_phase, 2, function(col) any(col == 0)))) {
  warning("Zero cell(s) detected for some phase levels (check separation).")
}

phi <- sum(residuals(best_gee_model, type = "pearson")^2) / (nrow(d) - length(coef(best_gee_model)))
cat("\nPearson scale (phi):", round(phi, 3), " ( >1 suggests overdispersion )\n")

if (!is.null(best_gee_model$geese$alpha)) {
  cat("Estimated working correlation (alpha):", round(best_gee_model$geese$alpha, 3), "\n")
}

# Influence: leave-one-ID-out on first 'phase' term (usually phaseT2)
phase_terms <- grep("^phase", names(coef(best_gee_model)), value = TRUE)
if (length(phase_terms) > 0) {
  target   <- phase_terms[1]
  base_est <- coef(best_gee_model)[target]
  ids <- unique(d$ID)
  set.seed(1)
  probe_ids <- if (length(ids) > 80) sample(ids, 80) else ids
  loo_delta <- sapply(probe_ids, function(i){
    dd <- d[d$ID != i, ]
    dd <- dd[order(dd$ID, dd$phase), ]
    fam_best <- families[[best_link]]
    fit_i <- geeglm(form, id = ID, waves = wave, family = fam_best, corstr = best_cor, data = dd)
    cf <- coef(fit_i); if (!target %in% names(cf)) return(NA_real_)
    cf[target] - base_est
  })
  infl_tab <- data.frame(ID = probe_ids, dBeta = loo_delta)
  infl_tab <- infl_tab[order(abs(infl_tab$dBeta), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  cat("\nTop 10 influential clusters for", target, "(|Δβ|):\n")
  print(head(infl_tab, 10), row.names = FALSE)
}

# ---- 4) Effects table with robust CIs ----------------------------
est <- coef(best_gee_model)
se  <- sqrt(diag(best_gee_model$geese$vbeta))     # robust (sandwich)
z   <- est / se
p   <- 2*pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE)

if (best_link == "logit") {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    OR  = round(exp(est), 3),
    LCL = round(exp(est - 1.96*se), 3),
    UCL = round(exp(est + 1.96*se), 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
} else {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    Estimate = round(est, 3),
    LCL = round(est - 1.96*se),   # link scale
    UCL = round(est + 1.96*se),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    Link = best_link,
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
}
cat("\nPopulation-averaged effects for best GEE model (Allergy):\n"); print(OUT)

# ---- 5) Pairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) -----------
# Use ROBUST covariance in emmeans
emm  <- emmeans(best_gee_model, ~ phase, vcov. = best_gee_model$geese$vbeta)
cmp  <- pairs(emm, adjust = "holm")
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (", best_link, " link):\n", sep = ""); print(summary(cmp))

# Also show odds ratios if the chosen link is logit
if (best_link == "logit") {
  sc <- summary(cmp)
  OR_tab <- transform(sc,
    OR  = exp(estimate),
    LCL = exp(estimate - 1.96*SE),
    UCL = exp(estimate + 1.96*SE)
  )[ , c("contrast","OR","LCL","UCL","p.value")]
  cat("\nPairwise odds ratios (logit link):\n"); print(OR_tab, row.names = FALSE)
}

cat("\nCoefficient names:\n"); print(names(coef(best_gee_model)))

```



6.Heatwave Hypertension LGME (RIS)
```{r,eval=FALSE}
## ============================
## GLMM selector for Hypertension (T1/T2/T3 coding)
## ============================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(splines)
  library(emmeans)   # optional; only used if factor-time wins
})

## ---------- Prep ----------
stopifnot(all(c("Hypertension","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long)))

# Ensure binary 0/1 and drop unused levels
dat_long$Hypertension <- as.integer(dat_long$Hypertension)
dat_long <- droplevels(dat_long)

# Phase as UNordered factor (T1 reference)
dat_long$phase <- factor(dat_long$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)

# Force treatment contrasts
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))

# Be tolerant to grouped/raw names
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(dat_long)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(dat_long)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# Numeric time encodings
dat_long$phase_num   <- as.numeric(dat_long$phase) - 1            # 0,1,2 with T1=0
dat_long$phase_num_c <- scale(dat_long$phase_num, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)

# Controls
ctrl_RI  <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))
ctrl_RIS <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 5e5))

## ---------- Covariate set (auto-drop HTN_prior) ----------
base_covs <- c("Age_Group","Gender", fam_sz, inc, "HH_Area",
               "Asthma_prior","Thyroid_prior")
# If you truly want HTN_prior in sensitivity runs, add it back later on purpose.
covars <- base_covs[base_covs %in% names(dat_long)]

## ---------- Step 1: RI vs RIS with factor-time ----------
rhs_factor <- paste(c("phase", covars), collapse = " + ")

form_RI_factor  <- as.formula(paste0("Hypertension ~ ", rhs_factor, " + (1 | ID)"))
form_RIS_factor <- as.formula(paste0("Hypertension ~ ", rhs_factor, " + (phase | ID)"))

fit_RI  <- glmer(form_RI_factor,  family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)
fit_RIS <- glmer(form_RIS_factor, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ =  1, control = ctrl_RIS)

aic_random <- AIC(fit_RI, fit_RIS); print(aic_random)
best_random <- if (aic_random$AIC[1] <= aic_random$AIC[2]) "RI" else "RIS"
cat("\n>> Best random structure by AIC:", best_random, "\n")

## ---------- Step 2: Compare time effects (factor / linear / quadratic) ----------
if (best_random == "RI") {
  fit_factor <- fit_RI

  form_RI_linear <- as.formula(
    paste0("Hypertension ~ phase_num + ", paste(covars, collapse = " + "), " + (1 | ID)")
  )
  fit_linear <- glmer(form_RI_linear, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

  form_RI_quad <- as.formula(
    paste0("Hypertension ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + ",
           paste(covars, collapse = " + "), " + (1 | ID)")
  )
  fit_quadratic <- glmer(form_RI_quad, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

} else { # RIS
  fit_factor <- fit_RIS

  form_RIS_linear <- as.formula(
    paste0("Hypertension ~ phase_num + ", paste(covars, collapse = " + "),
           " + (phase_num | ID)")
  )
  fit_linear <- glmer(form_RIS_linear, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 1, control = ctrl_RIS)

  form_RIS_quad <- as.formula(
    paste0("Hypertension ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + ",
           paste(covars, collapse = " + "), " + (phase_num_c | ID)")
  )
  fit_quadratic <- glmer(form_RIS_quad, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 1, control = ctrl_RIS)
}

# AIC comparison
aic_time <- data.frame(
  TimeSpec = c("factor","linear","quadratic"),
  AIC      = c(AIC(fit_factor), AIC(fit_linear), AIC(fit_quadratic))
)
aic_time <- aic_time[order(aic_time$AIC), ]
cat("\n>> Time-effect AICs within chosen random structure:\n"); print(aic_time)

best_timespec <- aic_time$TimeSpec[1]
best_glmm <- switch(best_timespec,
  factor    = fit_factor,
  linear    = fit_linear,
  quadratic = fit_quadratic
)

cat("\n================ BEST GLMM (Hypertension) ================\n")
cat("Random structure:", best_random, "\n")
cat("Time specification:", best_timespec, "\n")
cat("AIC:", AIC(best_glmm), "\n\n")
print(summary(best_glmm))

## ---------- Optional: pairwise phase contrasts if factor-time wins ----------
if (best_timespec == "factor") {
  cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) with Holm adjust:\n")
  emm <- emmeans(best_glmm, ~ phase)
  print(pairs(emm, adjust = "holm"))
}

## (Optional) restore previous contrast settings
options(op_old)

```


6.Heatwave Hypertension LGME (RIS)
```{r,eval=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(performance))

# Use the SELECTED Hypertension GLMM
assess_htn <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  best_glmm,   # winner from your Hypertension selector
  data = dat_long,
  do_plots = TRUE,
  do_sensitivity = TRUE
)

# Quick summary
assess_htn$overall_ok
assess_htn$sensitivity$agreement


```



6.Heatwave Hypertension LGME (RI)
```{r}
# ============================
# RI-only GLMM — Hypertension (heatwave, dat_long)
# - Fit RI only
# - Compare AIC for factor/linear/quadratic time
# - ALWAYS report factor time model
# ============================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(emmeans)      # pairwise contrasts
  library(performance)  # check_glmm_assumptions()
})

## --- Prep ---
stopifnot(all(c("Hypertension","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long)))

# Robust 0/1 coercion
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Hypertension must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (any(is.na(out))) stop("Unrecognized Hypertension values.")
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Hypertension type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d <- dat_long
d$Hypertension <- to01(d$Hypertension)

# Phase as categorical T1/T2/T3 (T1 baseline)
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))

# Flexible columns for family size & income
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(d)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(d)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# Numeric encodings for time (for linear/quadratic candidates)
d$phase_num   <- as.numeric(d$phase) - 1               # 0,1,2
d$phase_num_c <- scale(d$phase_num, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)

ctrl_RI <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))

## --- RI models with different time effects ---

# 1) Factor time (response profile: T2/T3 vs T1)
form_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Hypertension ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_factor <- glmer(form_factor, family = binomial, data = d,
                    nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# 2) Linear time
form_linear <- as.formula(
  paste0("Hypertension ~ phase_num + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_linear <- glmer(form_linear, family = binomial, data = d,
                    nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# 3) Quadratic time
form_quad <- as.formula(
  paste0("Hypertension ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_quad <- glmer(form_quad, family = binomial, data = d,
                  nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

## --- AIC comparison (info only) ---
cat("\n=== AIC: RI time specifications (Hypertension) ===\n")
aic_tab <- data.frame(
  TimeSpec = c("factor","linear","quadratic"),
  AIC      = c(AIC(fit_factor), AIC(fit_linear), AIC(fit_quad))
)
print(aic_tab[order(aic_tab$AIC), ])

## --- Forced selection: ALWAYS factor model ---
best_timespec <- "factor"
best_glmm_RI  <- fit_factor
cat("\n>> Reporting RI + FACTOR time model (Hypertension)\n")

## --- Assumptions ---
assess_RI <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  best_glmm_RI,
  data = d,
  do_plots = TRUE,
  do_sensitivity = TRUE
)
cat("\nAssumption check — overall OK? ", assess_RI$overall_ok, "\n")
cat("Sensitivity agreement (GLM-CRSE, GEE):\n")
print(assess_RI$sensitivity$agreement)

## --- Summary ---
cat("\n=== Summary of the selected RI model (Hypertension) ===\n")
print(summary(best_glmm_RI))

## --- Pairwise phase contrasts (always, since factor selected) ---
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (log-odds), Holm-adjusted:\n")
emm_fac <- emmeans(best_glmm_RI, ~ phase)
print(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"))

cat("\nSame contrasts as odds ratios (95% CI):\n")
print(summary(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"), type = "response", infer = c(TRUE, TRUE)))

## (Optional) restore previous contrast settings
options(op_old)

```





6.Heatwave Hypertension GEE
```{r}
# ===========================
# GEE selection + assumptions (Hypertension outcome) - T1/T2/T3 coding
# ===========================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(geepack); library(emmeans) })

# ---- 0) Clean & sort --------------------------------------------
vars <- c("Hypertension","phase","Age_Group","Gender","Family_Size_Group",
          "Monthly_Income_Group","HH_Area","HTN_prior","Asthma_prior",
          "Thyroid_prior","ID")

d <- na.omit(dat_long[, vars])
d <- droplevels(d)

# Robust 0/1 coercion for the binary outcome
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Hypertension must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (any(is.na(out))) {
      bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
      stop("Unrecognized Hypertension levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
    }
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Hypertension type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d$Hypertension <- to01(d$Hypertension)

# >>> Use treatment contrasts (T1 reference), NOT polynomial L/Q
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)
# options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.poly"))  # optional

# Sort so AR(1) can infer spacing by row order (if chosen)
d <- d[order(d$ID, d$phase), ]

# Common formula (same covariates as your GLMM)
form <- Hypertension ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + Family_Size_Group + Monthly_Income_Group +
  HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior

# ---- 1) Fit grid: working correlation × link ---------------------
cor_opts <- c("independence","exchangeable","ar1","unstructured")
families <- list(
  logit   = stats::binomial(link = "logit"),
  probit  = stats::binomial(link = "probit"),
  cloglog = stats::binomial(link = "cloglog")
)

fits <- list(); rows <- list()
for (cc in cor_opts) {
  for (lname in names(families)) {
    fam <- families[[lname]]
    key <- paste(cc, lname, sep = "_")
    fit <- geeglm(form, id = ID, family = fam, corstr = cc, data = d)
    qic <- geepack::QIC(fit)
    fits[[key]] <- fit
    rows[[key]] <- data.frame(Correlation = cc, Link = lname,
                              QIC = unname(qic[["QIC"]]),
                              QICu = if (!is.null(qic[["QICu"]])) unname(qic[["QICu"]]) else NA_real_)
  }
}
sel_tab <- do.call(rbind, rows)
row.names(sel_tab) <- NULL
sel_tab <- sel_tab[order(sel_tab$QIC), ]
cat("\nModel selection grid (lower QIC is better):\n"); print(sel_tab)

best_idx  <- which.min(sel_tab$QIC)
best_cor  <- sel_tab$Correlation[best_idx]
best_link <- sel_tab$Link[best_idx]
fit_best  <- fits[[paste(best_cor, best_link, sep = "_")]]

cat("\nBest: correlation =", best_cor, ", link =", best_link,
    " (QIC =", round(sel_tab$QIC[best_idx], 3),
    if (!is.na(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx])) paste0(", QICu = ", round(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx], 3)) else "",
    ")\n")

# Save the selected model and show a summary
best_gee_model <- fit_best
summary(best_gee_model)

# ---- 2) Slide-style table (logit only) ---------------------------
if (!is.null(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])) {
  qic_log <- c(
    Unstructured              = geepack::QIC(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `Constant (Exchangeable)` = geepack::QIC(fits[["exchangeable_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `AR(1)`                   = geepack::QIC(fits[["ar1_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    Independence              = geepack::QIC(fits[["independence_logit"]])[["QIC"]]
  )
  pres_tab <- data.frame(Correlation = names(qic_log),
                         `QIC (logit)` = round(unname(qic_log), 1),
                         check.names = FALSE)
  cat("\nWorking correlation comparison (logit only):\n"); print(pres_tab)
}

# ---- 3) Diagnostics ----------------------------------------------
# 3a) Clusters & size
n_clusters <- length(unique(d$ID))
cat("\n# Clusters:", n_clusters, "\n")
cat("Cluster-size distribution:\n"); print(table(table(d$ID)))

# 3b) Within-ID variation for 'phase'
wcv <- tapply(d$phase, d$ID, function(x) length(unique(x)))
cat("Proportion of clusters with >1 phase level:", round(mean(wcv > 1), 3), "\n")

# 3c) Sparse cells / separation check for phase
tab_phase <- xtabs(~ Hypertension + phase, data = d)
cat("\nContingency of Hypertension by phase:\n"); print(tab_phase)

# 3d) Overdispersion (binomial quasi-likelihood)
phi <- sum(residuals(best_gee_model, type = "pearson")^2) / (nrow(d) - length(coef(best_gee_model)))
cat("\nPearson scale (phi):", round(phi, 3), " ( >1 suggests overdispersion )\n")

# 3e) Estimated working correlation
if (!is.null(best_gee_model$geese$alpha)) {
  cat("Estimated working correlation (alpha):", round(best_gee_model$geese$alpha, 3), "\n")
}

# 3f) Influence: leave-one-ID-out on first 'phase' term (T2 vs T1 coefficient)
phase_terms <- grep("^phase", names(coef(best_gee_model)), value = TRUE)
if (length(phase_terms) > 0) {
  target   <- phase_terms[1]   # typically "phaseT2" if T1 is reference
  base_est <- coef(best_gee_model)[target]
  ids <- unique(d$ID)
  set.seed(1)
  probe_ids <- if (length(ids) > 80) sample(ids, 80) else ids

  loo_delta <- sapply(probe_ids, function(i){
    dd <- d[d$ID != i, ]
    dd <- dd[order(dd$ID, dd$phase), ]
    fam_best <- families[[best_link]]
    fit_i <- geeglm(form, id = ID, family = fam_best, corstr = best_cor, data = dd)
    cf <- coef(fit_i); if (!target %in% names(cf)) return(NA_real_)
    cf[target] - base_est
  })
  infl_tab <- data.frame(ID = probe_ids, dBeta = loo_delta)
  infl_tab <- infl_tab[order(abs(infl_tab$dBeta), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  cat("\nTop 10 influential clusters for", target, "(|Δβ|):\n")
  print(head(infl_tab, 10), row.names = FALSE)
}

# ---- 4) Effects table with robust CIs ----------------------------
est <- coef(best_gee_model)
se  <- sqrt(diag(best_gee_model$geese$vbeta))     # robust (sandwich)
z   <- est / se
p   <- 2*pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE)

if (best_link == "logit") {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    OR  = round(exp(est), 3),
    LCL = round(exp(est - 1.96*se), 3),
    UCL = round(exp(est + 1.96*se), 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
} else {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    Estimate = round(est, 3),
    LCL = round(est - 1.96*se, 3),   # link scale
    UCL = round(est + 1.96*se, 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    Link = best_link,
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
}
cat("\nPopulation-averaged effects for best GEE model (Hypertension):\n"); print(OUT)

# ---- 5) Pairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) -----------
emm  <- emmeans(best_gee_model, ~ phase, vcov. = vcov(best_gee_model))   # robust vcov
cmp  <- pairs(emm, adjust = "holm")
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (", best_link, " link):\n", sep = ""); print(summary(cmp))

# Also show odds ratios if the chosen link is logit
if (best_link == "logit") {
  sc <- summary(cmp)
  OR_tab <- transform(sc,
    OR  = exp(estimate),
    LCL = exp(estimate - 1.96*SE),
    UCL = exp(estimate + 1.96*SE)
  )[ , c("contrast","OR","LCL","UCL","p.value")]
  cat("\nPairwise odds ratios (logit link):\n"); print(OR_tab, row.names = FALSE)
}

```



```{r}
# ===========================
# GEE selection + assumptions (Hypertension outcome) - T1/T2/T3 coding
# ===========================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(geepack); library(emmeans) })

# ---- 0) Clean & sort --------------------------------------------
# use HEATWAVE long data
base_df <- dat_long

# allow for grouped or raw versions of family size & income
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(base_df)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(base_df)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

vars <- c("Hypertension","phase","Age_Group","Gender", fam_sz, inc,
          "HH_Area","HTN_prior","Asthma_prior","Thyroid_prior","CVDs_prior","ID")

d <- na.omit(base_df[, vars])
d <- droplevels(d)
stopifnot(!anyNA(d$ID))

# Robust 0/1 coercion for the binary outcome
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x)); if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Hypertension must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (any(is.na(out))) {
      bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
      stop("Unrecognized Hypertension levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
    }
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Hypertension type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d$Hypertension <- to01(d$Hypertension)

# T1/T2/T3 treatment contrasts (no polynomial L/Q)
want_lvls <- c("T1","T2","T3")
if (!all(want_lvls %in% levels(d$phase))) {
  stop("phase must have levels T1, T2, T3; found: ", paste(levels(d$phase), collapse=", "))
}
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = want_lvls, ordered = FALSE)
contrasts(d$phase) <- stats::contr.treatment(n = length(levels(d$phase)), base = 1)

# AR(1) wave index + sort so spacing is by row order
d$wave <- as.integer(d$phase)  # T1=1, T2=2, T3=3
d <- d[order(d$ID, d$phase), ]

# Common formula (same covariates as your GLMM)
form <- as.formula(sprintf(
  "Hypertension ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + %s + %s + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior",
  fam_sz, inc
))

# ---- 1) Fit grid: working correlation × link ---------------------
cor_opts <- c("independence","exchangeable","ar1","unstructured")
families <- list(
  logit   = stats::binomial(link = "logit"),
  probit  = stats::binomial(link = "probit"),
  cloglog = stats::binomial(link = "cloglog")
)

fits <- list(); rows <- list()
for (cc in cor_opts) {
  for (lname in names(families)) {
    fam <- families[[lname]]
    key <- paste(cc, lname, sep = "_")
    fit <- geeglm(form, id = ID, waves = wave, family = fam, corstr = cc, data = d)
    qic <- geepack::QIC(fit)
    fits[[key]] <- fit
    rows[[key]] <- data.frame(Correlation = cc, Link = lname,
                              QIC = unname(qic[["QIC"]]),
                              QICu = if (!is.null(qic[["QICu"]])) unname(qic[["QICu"]]) else NA_real_)
  }
}
sel_tab <- do.call(rbind, rows); row.names(sel_tab) <- NULL
sel_tab <- sel_tab[order(sel_tab$QIC), ]
cat("\nModel selection grid (lower QIC is better):\n"); print(sel_tab)

best_idx  <- which.min(sel_tab$QIC)
best_cor  <- sel_tab$Correlation[best_idx]
best_link <- sel_tab$Link[best_idx]
best_gee_model <- fits[[paste(best_cor, best_link, sep = "_")]]
cat("\nBest: correlation =", best_cor, ", link =", best_link,
    " (QIC =", round(sel_tab$QIC[best_idx], 3),
    if (!is.na(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx])) paste0(", QICu = ", round(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx], 3)) else "",
    ")\n")

# Full model summary
cat("\n=== Summary of the best GEE model (Hypertension) ===\n")
print(summary(best_gee_model))

# ---- 2) Slide-style table (logit only) ---------------------------
if (!is.null(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])) {
  qic_log <- c(
    Unstructured              = geepack::QIC(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `Constant (Exchangeable)` = geepack::QIC(fits[["exchangeable_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `AR(1)`                   = geepack::QIC(fits[["ar1_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    Independence              = geepack::QIC(fits[["independence_logit"]])[["QIC"]]
  )
  pres_tab <- data.frame(Correlation = names(qic_log),
                         `QIC (logit)` = round(unname(qic_log), 1),
                         check.names = FALSE)
  cat("\nWorking correlation comparison (logit only):\n"); print(pres_tab)
}

# ---- 3) Diagnostics ----------------------------------------------
n_clusters <- length(unique(d$ID))
cat("\n# Clusters:", n_clusters, "\n")
cat("Cluster-size distribution:\n"); print(table(table(d$ID)))

wcv <- tapply(d$phase, d$ID, function(x) length(unique(x)))
cat("Proportion of clusters with >1 phase level:", round(mean(wcv > 1), 3), "\n")

tab_phase <- xtabs(~ Hypertension + phase, data = d)
cat("\nContingency of Hypertension by phase:\n"); print(tab_phase)
if (any(apply(tab_phase, 2, function(col) any(col == 0)))) {
  warning("Zero cell(s) detected for some phase levels (check separation).")
}

phi <- sum(residuals(best_gee_model, type = "pearson")^2) / (nrow(d) - length(coef(best_gee_model)))
cat("\nPearson scale (phi):", round(phi, 3), " ( >1 suggests overdispersion )\n")

if (!is.null(best_gee_model$geese$alpha)) {
  cat("Estimated working correlation (alpha):", round(best_gee_model$geese$alpha, 3), "\n")
}

# Influence: leave-one-ID-out on first 'phase' term (usually phaseT2)
phase_terms <- grep("^phase", names(coef(best_gee_model)), value = TRUE)
if (length(phase_terms) > 0) {
  target   <- phase_terms[1]
  base_est <- coef(best_gee_model)[target]
  ids <- unique(d$ID)
  set.seed(1)
  probe_ids <- if (length(ids) > 80) sample(ids, 80) else ids
  loo_delta <- sapply(probe_ids, function(i){
    dd <- d[d$ID != i, ]
    dd <- dd[order(dd$ID, dd$phase), ]
    fam_best <- families[[best_link]]
    fit_i <- geeglm(form, id = ID, waves = wave, family = fam_best, corstr = best_cor, data = dd)
    cf <- coef(fit_i); if (!target %in% names(cf)) return(NA_real_)
    cf[target] - base_est
  })
  infl_tab <- data.frame(ID = probe_ids, dBeta = loo_delta)
  infl_tab <- infl_tab[order(abs(infl_tab$dBeta), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  cat("\nTop 10 influential clusters for", target, "(|Δβ|):\n")
  print(head(infl_tab, 10), row.names = FALSE)
}

# ---- 4) Effects table with robust CIs ----------------------------
est <- coef(best_gee_model)
se  <- sqrt(diag(best_gee_model$geese$vbeta))     # robust (sandwich)
z   <- est / se
p   <- 2*pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE)

if (best_link == "logit") {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    OR  = round(exp(est), 3),
    LCL = round(exp(est - 1.96*se), 3),
    UCL = round(exp(est + 1.96*se), 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
} else {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    Estimate = round(est, 3),
    LCL = round(est - 1.96*se, 3),   # link scale
    UCL = round(est + 1.96*se, 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    Link = best_link,
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
}
cat("\nPopulation-averaged effects for best GEE model (Hypertension):\n"); print(OUT)

# ---- 5) Pairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) -----------
# Use ROBUST covariance in emmeans
emm  <- emmeans(best_gee_model, ~ phase, vcov. = best_gee_model$geese$vbeta)
cmp  <- pairs(emm, adjust = "holm")
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (", best_link, " link):\n", sep = ""); print(summary(cmp))

# Also show odds ratios if the chosen link is logit
if (best_link == "logit") {
  sc <- summary(cmp)
  OR_tab <- transform(sc,
    OR  = exp(estimate),
    LCL = exp(estimate - 1.96*SE),
    UCL = exp(estimate + 1.96*SE)
  )[ , c("contrast","OR","LCL","UCL","p.value")]
  cat("\nPairwise odds ratios (logit link):\n"); print(OR_tab, row.names = FALSE)
}

cat("\nCoefficient names:\n"); print(names(coef(best_gee_model)))

```



Time Pair Test for Heatwave Affected and Condition (10% or above outcome only)
```{r}
# ========= Pairwise OR for T2 vs T3 for ANY outcome(s) =========

# 0/1 coercion (reuse if you already defined it)
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric outcome must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
  zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
  out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
  if (any(is.na(out))) {
    bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
    stop("Unrecognized levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
  }
  out
}

# Build a RHS (predictors) string once (uses your chosen grouped/raw names)
form_rhs <- sprintf(
  "phase + Age_Group + Gender + %s + %s + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior",
  fam_sz, inc
)

# Ensure phase is correctly coded in base_df (do once here for safety)
want_lvls <- c("T1","T2","T3")
stopifnot("phase" %in% names(base_df))
base_df$phase <- factor(base_df$phase, levels = want_lvls, ordered = FALSE)
base_df$wave  <- as.integer(base_df$phase)

# Helper: fit logit GEE for one outcome and compute T2 vs T3 OR, CI, p
gee_pair_T2vsT3 <- function(outcome, corstr = "exchangeable") {
  if (!outcome %in% names(base_df)) {
    stop("Outcome '", outcome, "' not found in base_df. Available names include: ",
         paste(head(names(base_df), 40), collapse=", "), " ...")
  }
  # Select columns for this outcome + predictors
  keep <- unique(c(outcome, "phase", "Age_Group", "Gender", fam_sz, inc,
                   "HH_Area", "HTN_prior", "Asthma_prior", "Thyroid_prior", "CVDs_prior", "ID", "wave"))
  dd <- base_df[, keep, drop = FALSE]
  dd <- droplevels(na.omit(dd))
  stopifnot(!anyNA(dd$ID))

  # Binary-coerce the outcome
  dd[[outcome]] <- to01(dd[[outcome]])

  # Fit logit GEE with your chosen working correlation
  form <- as.formula(paste0(outcome, " ~ ", form_rhs))
  fit  <- geeglm(form, id = ID, waves = wave,
                 family = binomial(link = "logit"),
                 corstr = corstr, data = dd)

  # Robust (sandwich) VCV + T2 vs T3 contrast on the link scale, then exp()
  b <- coef(fit)
  V <- fit$geese$vbeta
  cn <- names(b)

  # Find phase coefficients robustly (handles names like 'phaseT2', 'phase.T2', etc.)
  b_T2 <- grep("^phase.*T2$", cn, value = TRUE)
  b_T3 <- grep("^phase.*T3$", cn, value = TRUE)
  if (length(b_T2) != 1L || length(b_T3) != 1L) {
    stop("Could not locate unique phase coefficients for T2/T3. Coefs were: ", paste(cn, collapse=", "))
  }

  L <- rep(0, length(b))
  L[cn == b_T2] <-  1
  L[cn == b_T3] <- -1

  est  <- as.numeric(t(L) %*% b)                 # beta_T2 - beta_T3
  var  <- as.numeric(t(L) %*% V %*% L)
  se   <- sqrt(var)
  z    <- est / se
  pval <- 2 * pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE)

  OR   <- exp(est)
  LCL  <- exp(est - 1.96*se)
  UCL  <- exp(est + 1.96*se)

  data.frame(
    Outcome  = outcome,
    Contrast = "T2 vs T3",
    OR       = round(OR, 2),
    LCL      = round(LCL, 2),
    UCL      = round(UCL, 2),
    `OR (95% CI)` = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f–%.2f)", round(OR,2), round(LCL,2), round(UCL,2)),
    p.value  = ifelse(pval < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", pval)),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE
  )
}

# -------- Run for ALL your outcomes in one go --------
# Use your best working correlation (from your earlier QIC selection), or set explicitly
cor_to_use <- if (exists("best_cor")) best_cor else "exchangeable"

outcomes <- c("Affected", "Dyspnea", "Fatigue", "Hypertension", "Cardiovascular")  # <-- edit names to match your columns
res_list <- lapply(outcomes, function(y) gee_pair_T2vsT3(y, corstr = cor_to_use))

# Bind results (skips outcomes that errored)
res_pairs <- do.call(rbind, res_list)
cat("\nT2 vs T3 pairwise ORs (logit GEE, robust SE):\n")
print(res_pairs, row.names = FALSE)


```















7. Heatwave Respiratory LGME (RIS)
```{r,eval=FALSE}
## ============================
## GLMM selector for Respiratory (T1/T2/T3 coding)
## ============================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(splines)
  library(emmeans)   # optional; only used if factor-time wins
})

## ---------- Prep ----------
stopifnot(all(c("Respiratory","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long)))

# Ensure binary 0/1 and drop unused levels
dat_long$Respiratory <- as.integer(dat_long$Respiratory)
dat_long <- droplevels(dat_long)

# Phase as UNordered factor (T1 reference)
dat_long$phase <- factor(dat_long$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)

# Force treatment contrasts
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))

# Be tolerant to grouped/raw names
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(dat_long)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(dat_long)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# Numeric time encodings
dat_long$phase_num   <- as.numeric(dat_long$phase) - 1            # 0,1,2 with T1=0
dat_long$phase_num_c <- scale(dat_long$phase_num, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)

# Controls
ctrl_RI  <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))
ctrl_RIS <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 5e5))

## ---------- Covariate set (keep all priors; no auto-drop) ----------
covars <- c("Age_Group","Gender", fam_sz, inc, "HH_Area",
            "HTN_prior","Asthma_prior","Thyroid_prior","CVDs_prior")
covars <- covars[covars %in% names(dat_long)]

## ---------- Step 1: RI vs RIS with factor-time ----------
rhs_factor <- paste(c("phase", covars), collapse = " + ")

form_RI_factor  <- as.formula(paste0("Respiratory ~ ", rhs_factor, " + (1 | ID)"))
form_RIS_factor <- as.formula(paste0("Respiratory ~ ", rhs_factor, " + (phase | ID)"))

fit_RI  <- glmer(form_RI_factor,  family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)
fit_RIS <- glmer(form_RIS_factor, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ =  1, control = ctrl_RIS)

aic_random <- AIC(fit_RI, fit_RIS); print(aic_random)
best_random <- if (aic_random$AIC[1] <= aic_random$AIC[2]) "RI" else "RIS"
cat("\n>> Best random structure by AIC:", best_random, "\n")

## ---------- Step 2: Compare time effects (factor / linear / quadratic) ----------
if (best_random == "RI") {
  fit_factor <- fit_RI

  form_RI_linear <- as.formula(
    paste0("Respiratory ~ phase_num + ", paste(covars, collapse = " + "), " + (1 | ID)")
  )
  fit_linear <- glmer(form_RI_linear, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

  form_RI_quad <- as.formula(
    paste0("Respiratory ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + ",
           paste(covars, collapse = " + "), " + (1 | ID)")
  )
  fit_quadratic <- glmer(form_RI_quad, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

} else { # RIS
  fit_factor <- fit_RIS

  form_RIS_linear <- as.formula(
    paste0("Respiratory ~ phase_num + ", paste(covars, collapse = " + "),
           " + (phase_num | ID)")
  )
  fit_linear <- glmer(form_RIS_linear, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 1, control = ctrl_RIS)

  form_RIS_quad <- as.formula(
    paste0("Respiratory ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + ",
           paste(covars, collapse = " + "), " + (phase_num_c | ID)")
  )
  fit_quadratic <- glmer(form_RIS_quad, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 1, control = ctrl_RIS)
}

# AIC comparison
aic_time <- data.frame(
  TimeSpec = c("factor","linear","quadratic"),
  AIC      = c(AIC(fit_factor), AIC(fit_linear), AIC(fit_quadratic))
)
aic_time <- aic_time[order(aic_time$AIC), ]
cat("\n>> Time-effect AICs within chosen random structure:\n"); print(aic_time)

best_timespec <- aic_time$TimeSpec[1]
best_glmm <- switch(best_timespec,
  factor    = fit_factor,
  linear    = fit_linear,
  quadratic = fit_quadratic
)

cat("\n================ BEST GLMM (Respiratory) ================\n")
cat("Random structure:", best_random, "\n")
cat("Time specification:", best_timespec, "\n")
cat("AIC:", AIC(best_glmm), "\n\n")
print(summary(best_glmm))

## ---------- Optional: pairwise phase contrasts if factor-time wins ----------
if (best_timespec == "factor") {
  cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) with Holm adjust:\n")
  emm <- emmeans(best_glmm, ~ phase)
  print(pairs(emm, adjust = "holm"))
}

## (Optional) restore previous contrast settings
options(op_old)

```

```{r,eval=FALSE}
# Use the SELECTED Respiratory GLMM
assess_htn <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  best_glmm,   # winner from your Respiratory selector
  data = dat_long,
  do_plots = TRUE,
  do_sensitivity = TRUE
)

# Quick summary
assess_htn$overall_ok
assess_htn$sensitivity$agreement
```
