7. Heatwave Respiratory LGME (RI_Force)
```{r}
## ============================
## RI-only GLMM: select time effect → check assumptions → summarize
##   Outcome: Respiratory
## ============================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(emmeans)      # for phase contrasts if factor time wins
  library(performance)  # for check_glmm_assumptions()
})

## --- Prep ---
stopifnot(all(c("Respiratory","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long)))
dat_long$Respiratory <- as.integer(dat_long$Respiratory)

# Phase as categorical T1/T2/T3 (T1 baseline)
dat_long$phase <- factor(dat_long$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))

# Be tolerant to alternate column names
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(dat_long)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(dat_long)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# Numeric encodings for time
dat_long$phase_num   <- as.numeric(factor(dat_long$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"))) - 1  # 0,1,2
dat_long$phase_num_c <- scale(dat_long$phase_num, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)

ctrl_RI <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))

## --- Fit RI models with different time effects ---

# 1) Factor (response profile: T2/T3 vs T1)
form_RI_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Respiratory ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_factor <- glmer(form_RI_factor, family = binomial, data = dat_long,
                       nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# 2) Linear time (0→1→2)
form_RI_linear <- as.formula(
  paste0("Respiratory ~ phase_num + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_linear <- glmer(form_RI_linear, family = binomial, data = dat_long,
                       nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# 3) Quadratic time (centered linear + square)
form_RI_quad <- as.formula(
  paste0("Respiratory ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_quad <- glmer(form_RI_quad, family = binomial, data = dat_long,
                     nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

## --- Select winner by AIC ---
aic_tab <- data.frame(
  TimeSpec = c("factor","linear","quadratic"),
  AIC      = c(AIC(fit_RI_factor), AIC(fit_RI_linear), AIC(fit_RI_quad))
)
aic_tab <- aic_tab[order(aic_tab$AIC), ]
print(aic_tab)

lowest_AIC <- min(aic_tab$AIC)
best_timespec <- aic_tab$TimeSpec[1]

best_glmm_RI <- switch(best_timespec,
  factor    = fit_RI_factor,
  linear    = fit_RI_linear,
  quadratic = fit_RI_quad
)

cat("\n>> RI winner by AIC:", best_timespec, " (AIC =", AIC(best_glmm_RI), ")\n")

## --- Assumption checks on the SELECTED model ---
assess_RI <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  best_glmm_RI,
  data = dat_long,
  do_plots = TRUE,
  do_sensitivity = TRUE
)

cat("\nAssumption check — overall OK? ", assess_RI$overall_ok, "\n")
cat("Sensitivity agreement (GLM-CRSE, GEE):\n")
print(assess_RI$sensitivity$agreement)

## --- Final summary of the SELECTED model ---
cat("\n=== Summary of the selected RI model (Respiratory) ===\n")
print(summary(best_glmm_RI))

## --- If FACTOR time won, show T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2 contrasts ---
if (best_timespec == "factor") {
  cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (log-odds), Holm-adjusted:\n")
  emm_fac <- emmeans(best_glmm_RI, ~ phase)
  print(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"))

  cat("\nSame contrasts as odds ratios (95% CI):\n")
  print(summary(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"), type = "response", infer = c(TRUE, TRUE)))
}

## (Optional) restore previous contrast settings
options(op_old)

```



7. Heatwave Respiratory GEE
```{r}
# ===========================
# GEE selection + assumptions (Respiratory outcome) - T1/T2/T3 coding
# ===========================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(geepack); library(emmeans) })

# ---- 0) Clean & sort --------------------------------------------
vars <- c("Respiratory","phase","Age_Group","Gender","Family_Size_Group",
          "Monthly_Income_Group","HH_Area","HTN_prior","Asthma_prior",
          "Thyroid_prior","CVDs_prior","ID")

d <- na.omit(dat_long[, vars])
d <- droplevels(d)

# Robust 0/1 coercion for the binary outcome
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Respiratory must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (any(is.na(out))) {
      bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
      stop("Unrecognized Respiratory levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
    }
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Respiratory type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d$Respiratory <- to01(d$Respiratory)

# Use treatment contrasts (T1 reference), NOT polynomial L/Q
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)

# Sort so AR(1) can infer spacing by row order (if chosen)
d <- d[order(d$ID, d$phase), ]

# Common formula (same covariates as your GLMM)
form <- Respiratory ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + Family_Size_Group + Monthly_Income_Group +
  HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior

# ---- 1) Fit grid: working correlation × link ---------------------
cor_opts <- c("independence","exchangeable","ar1","unstructured")
families <- list(
  logit   = stats::binomial(link = "logit"),
  probit  = stats::binomial(link = "probit"),
  cloglog = stats::binomial(link = "cloglog")
)

fits <- list(); rows <- list()
for (cc in cor_opts) {
  for (lname in names(families)) {
    fam <- families[[lname]]
    key <- paste(cc, lname, sep = "_")
    fit <- geeglm(form, id = ID, family = fam, corstr = cc, data = d)
    qic <- geepack::QIC(fit)
    fits[[key]] <- fit
    rows[[key]] <- data.frame(Correlation = cc, Link = lname,
                              QIC = unname(qic[["QIC"]]),
                              QICu = if (!is.null(qic[["QICu"]])) unname(qic[["QICu"]]) else NA_real_)
  }
}
sel_tab <- do.call(rbind, rows)
row.names(sel_tab) <- NULL
sel_tab <- sel_tab[order(sel_tab$QIC), ]
cat("\nModel selection grid (lower QIC is better):\n"); print(sel_tab)

best_idx  <- which.min(sel_tab$QIC)
best_cor  <- sel_tab$Correlation[best_idx]
best_link <- sel_tab$Link[best_idx]
fit_best  <- fits[[paste(best_cor, best_link, sep = "_")]]

cat("\nBest: correlation =", best_cor, ", link =", best_link,
    " (QIC =", round(sel_tab$QIC[best_idx], 3),
    if (!is.na(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx])) paste0(", QICu = ", round(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx], 3)) else "",
    ")\n")

# Save the selected model and show a summary
best_gee_model <- fit_best
summary(best_gee_model)

# ---- 2) Slide-style table (logit only) ---------------------------
if (!is.null(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])) {
  qic_log <- c(
    Unstructured              = geepack::QIC(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `Constant (Exchangeable)` = geepack::QIC(fits[["exchangeable_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `AR(1)`                   = geepack::QIC(fits[["ar1_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    Independence              = geepack::QIC(fits[["independence_logit"]])[["QIC"]]
  )
  pres_tab <- data.frame(Correlation = names(qic_log),
                         `QIC (logit)` = round(unname(qic_log), 1),
                         check.names = FALSE)
  cat("\nWorking correlation comparison (logit only):\n"); print(pres_tab)
}

# ---- 3) Diagnostics ----------------------------------------------
# 3a) Clusters & size
n_clusters <- length(unique(d$ID))
cat("\n# Clusters:", n_clusters, "\n")
cat("Cluster-size distribution:\n"); print(table(table(d$ID)))

# 3b) Within-ID variation for 'phase'
wcv <- tapply(d$phase, d$ID, function(x) length(unique(x)))
cat("Proportion of clusters with >1 phase level:", round(mean(wcv > 1), 3), "\n")

# 3c) Sparse cells / separation check for phase
tab_phase <- xtabs(~ Respiratory + phase, data = d)
cat("\nContingency of Respiratory by phase:\n"); print(tab_phase)

# 3d) Overdispersion (binomial quasi-likelihood)
phi <- sum(residuals(best_gee_model, type = "pearson")^2) / (nrow(d) - length(coef(best_gee_model)))
cat("\nPearson scale (phi):", round(phi, 3), " ( >1 suggests overdispersion )\n")

# 3e) Estimated working correlation
if (!is.null(best_gee_model$geese$alpha)) {
  cat("Estimated working correlation (alpha):", round(best_gee_model$geese$alpha, 3), "\n")
}

# 3f) Influence: leave-one-ID-out on first 'phase' term (T2 vs T1 coefficient)
phase_terms <- grep("^phase", names(coef(best_gee_model)), value = TRUE)
if (length(phase_terms) > 0) {
  target   <- phase_terms[1]
  base_est <- coef(best_gee_model)[target]
  ids <- unique(d$ID)
  set.seed(1)
  probe_ids <- if (length(ids) > 80) sample(ids, 80) else ids

  loo_delta <- sapply(probe_ids, function(i){
    dd <- d[d$ID != i, ]
    dd <- dd[order(dd$ID, dd$phase), ]
    fam_best <- families[[best_link]]
    fit_i <- geeglm(form, id = ID, family = fam_best, corstr = best_cor, data = dd)
    cf <- coef(fit_i); if (!target %in% names(cf)) return(NA_real_)
    cf[target] - base_est
  })
  infl_tab <- data.frame(ID = probe_ids, dBeta = loo_delta)
  infl_tab <- infl_tab[order(abs(infl_tab$dBeta), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  cat("\nTop 10 influential clusters for", target, "(|Δβ|):\n")
  print(head(infl_tab, 10), row.names = FALSE)
}

# ---- 4) Effects table with robust CIs ----------------------------
est <- coef(best_gee_model)
se  <- sqrt(diag(best_gee_model$geese$vbeta))     # robust (sandwich)
z   <- est / se
p   <- 2*pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE)

if (best_link == "logit") {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    OR  = round(exp(est), 3),
    LCL = round(exp(est - 1.96*se), 3),
    UCL = round(exp(est + 1.96*se), 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
} else {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    Estimate = round(est, 3),
    LCL = round(est - 1.96*se, 3),   # link scale
    UCL = round(est + 1.96*se, 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    Link = best_link,
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
}
cat("\nPopulation-averaged effects for best GEE model (Respiratory):\n"); print(OUT)

# ---- 5) Pairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) -----------
emm  <- emmeans(best_gee_model, ~ phase, vcov. = vcov(best_gee_model))   # robust vcov
cmp  <- pairs(emm, adjust = "holm")
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (", best_link, " link):\n", sep = ""); print(summary(cmp))

# Also show odds ratios if the chosen link is logit
if (best_link == "logit") {
  sc <- summary(cmp)
  OR_tab <- transform(sc,
    OR  = exp(estimate),
    LCL = exp(estimate - 1.96*SE),
    UCL = exp(estimate + 1.96*SE)
  )[ , c("contrast","OR","LCL","UCL","p.value")]
  cat("\nPairwise odds ratios (logit link):\n"); print(OR_tab, row.names = FALSE)
}

```




8. Heatwave Cardiovascular LGME
```{r}
## ===========================================
## RI-only GLMM (binomial) for Cardiovascular
## Time effect selection (factor / linear / quad)
## Tie rule: if factor ties for lowest AIC → choose factor
## If factor wins → show pairwise phase contrasts
## ===========================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(emmeans)      # pairwise phase contrasts
  library(performance)  # check_glmm_assumptions()
})

## ---------- Prep ----------
stopifnot(all(c("Cardiovascular","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long)))

# Robust 0/1 coercion
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Cardiovascular must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (anyNA(out)) {
      bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
      stop("Unrecognized Cardiovascular levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
    }
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Cardiovascular type: ", class(x)[1])
}
dat_long$Cardiovascular <- to01(dat_long$Cardiovascular)

# Phase as categorical (T1 reference); avoid polynomial contrasts
dat_long$phase <- factor(dat_long$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))

# Be tolerant to alternate column names
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(dat_long)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(dat_long)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# Time encodings
dat_long$phase_num   <- as.numeric(factor(dat_long$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"))) - 1  # 0,1,2
dat_long$phase_num_c <- scale(dat_long$phase_num, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)

# GLMM control
ctrl_RI <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))

## ---------- Fit competing time specifications ----------
# 1) Factor (T2/T3 vs T1)
form_RI_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Cardiovascular ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_factor <- suppressMessages(
  glmer(form_RI_factor, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)
)

# 2) Linear time (0→1→2)
form_RI_linear <- as.formula(
  paste0("Cardiovascular ~ phase_num + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_linear <- suppressMessages(
  glmer(form_RI_linear, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)
)

# 3) Quadratic time (centered linear + square)
form_RI_quad <- as.formula(
  paste0("Cardiovascular ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_quad <- suppressMessages(
  glmer(form_RI_quad, family = binomial, data = dat_long, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)
)

## ---------- Select winner by AIC (force factor if tied lowest) ----------
aic_tab <- data.frame(
  TimeSpec = c("factor","linear","quadratic"),
  AIC      = c(AIC(fit_RI_factor), AIC(fit_RI_linear), AIC(fit_RI_quad))
)
aic_tab <- aic_tab[order(aic_tab$AIC), ]
print(aic_tab)

tol <- 1e-8
minAIC <- min(aic_tab$AIC)
lowest <- aic_tab$TimeSpec[abs(aic_tab$AIC - minAIC) < tol]

best_timespec <- if ("factor" %in% lowest) "factor" else lowest[1]
best_glmm_RI <- switch(best_timespec,
  factor    = fit_RI_factor,
  linear    = fit_RI_linear,
  quadratic = fit_RI_quad
)

cat("\n>> RI winner by AIC (factor prioritized on ties):", best_timespec,
    " (AIC =", AIC(best_glmm_RI), ")\n")

## ---------- Assumption checks on the SELECTED model ----------
assess_RI <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  best_glmm_RI,
  data = dat_long,
  do_plots = TRUE,         # DHARMa-style residual checks
  do_sensitivity = TRUE    # GLM-CRSE / GEE comparison summary
)

cat("\nAssumption check — overall OK? ", assess_RI$overall_ok, "\n")
cat("Sensitivity agreement (GLM-CRSE, GEE):\n")
print(assess_RI$sensitivity$agreement)

## ---------- Final summary ----------
cat("\n=== Summary of the selected RI model (Cardiovascular) ===\n")
print(summary(best_glmm_RI))

## ---------- If FACTOR wins → show pairwise contrasts ----------
if (best_timespec == "factor") {
  cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (log-odds), Holm-adjusted:\n")
  emm_fac <- emmeans(best_glmm_RI, ~ phase)
  print(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"))

  cat("\nSame contrasts as odds ratios (95% CI):\n")
  print(summary(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"),
                type = "response", infer = c(TRUE, TRUE)))
}

## ---------- Restore previous contrast settings ----------
options(op_old)


```



8. Heatwave Cardiovascular GEE
```{r}
# ===========================
# GEE selection + assumptions (Cardiovascular outcome) - T1/T2/T3 coding
# ===========================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(geepack); library(emmeans) })

# ---- 0) Clean & sort --------------------------------------------
vars <- c("Cardiovascular","phase","Age_Group","Gender","Family_Size_Group",
          "Monthly_Income_Group","HH_Area","HTN_prior","Asthma_prior",
          "Thyroid_prior","ID")

d <- na.omit(dat_long[, vars])
d <- droplevels(d)

# Robust 0/1 coercion for the binary outcome
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Cardiovascular must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (any(is.na(out))) {
      bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
      stop("Unrecognized Cardiovascular levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
    }
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Cardiovascular type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d$Cardiovascular <- to01(d$Cardiovascular)

# Use treatment contrasts (T1 reference), NOT polynomial L/Q
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)

# Sort so AR(1) can infer spacing by row order (if chosen)
d <- d[order(d$ID, d$phase), ]

# Common formula (same covariates as your GLMM)
form <- Cardiovascular ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + Family_Size_Group + Monthly_Income_Group +
  HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior

# ---- 1) Fit grid: working correlation × link ---------------------
cor_opts <- c("independence","exchangeable","ar1","unstructured")
families <- list(
  logit   = stats::binomial(link = "logit"),
  probit  = stats::binomial(link = "probit"),
  cloglog = stats::binomial(link = "cloglog")
)

fits <- list(); rows <- list()
for (cc in cor_opts) {
  for (lname in names(families)) {
    fam <- families[[lname]]
    key <- paste(cc, lname, sep = "_")
    fit <- geeglm(form, id = ID, family = fam, corstr = cc, data = d)
    qic <- geepack::QIC(fit)
    fits[[key]] <- fit
    rows[[key]] <- data.frame(Correlation = cc, Link = lname,
                              QIC = unname(qic[["QIC"]]),
                              QICu = if (!is.null(qic[["QICu"]])) unname(qic[["QICu"]]) else NA_real_)
  }
}
sel_tab <- do.call(rbind, rows)
row.names(sel_tab) <- NULL
sel_tab <- sel_tab[order(sel_tab$QIC), ]
cat("\nModel selection grid (lower QIC is better):\n"); print(sel_tab)

best_idx  <- which.min(sel_tab$QIC)
best_cor  <- sel_tab$Correlation[best_idx]
best_link <- sel_tab$Link[best_idx]
fit_best  <- fits[[paste(best_cor, best_link, sep = "_")]]

cat("\nBest: correlation =", best_cor, ", link =", best_link,
    " (QIC =", round(sel_tab$QIC[best_idx], 3),
    if (!is.na(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx])) paste0(", QICu = ", round(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx], 3)) else "",
    ")\n")

# Save the selected model and show a summary
best_gee_model <- fit_best
summary(best_gee_model)

# ---- 2) Slide-style table (logit only) ---------------------------
if (!is.null(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])) {
  qic_log <- c(
    Unstructured              = geepack::QIC(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `Constant (Exchangeable)` = geepack::QIC(fits[["exchangeable_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `AR(1)`                   = geepack::QIC(fits[["ar1_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    Independence              = geepack::QIC(fits[["independence_logit"]])[["QIC"]]
  )
  pres_tab <- data.frame(Correlation = names(qic_log),
                         `QIC (logit)` = round(unname(qic_log), 1),
                         check.names = FALSE)
  cat("\nWorking correlation comparison (logit only):\n"); print(pres_tab)
}

# ---- 3) Diagnostics ----------------------------------------------
# 3a) Clusters & size
n_clusters <- length(unique(d$ID))
cat("\n# Clusters:", n_clusters, "\n")
cat("Cluster-size distribution:\n"); print(table(table(d$ID)))

# 3b) Within-ID variation for 'phase'
wcv <- tapply(d$phase, d$ID, function(x) length(unique(x)))
cat("Proportion of clusters with >1 phase level:", round(mean(wcv > 1), 3), "\n")

# 3c) Sparse cells / separation check for phase
tab_phase <- xtabs(~ Cardiovascular + phase, data = d)
cat("\nContingency of Cardiovascular by phase:\n"); print(tab_phase)

# 3d) Overdispersion (binomial quasi-likelihood)
phi <- sum(residuals(best_gee_model, type = "pearson")^2) / (nrow(d) - length(coef(best_gee_model)))
cat("\nPearson scale (phi):", round(phi, 3), " ( >1 suggests overdispersion )\n")

# 3e) Estimated working correlation
if (!is.null(best_gee_model$geese$alpha)) {
  cat("Estimated working correlation (alpha):", round(best_gee_model$geese$alpha, 3), "\n")
}

# 3f) Influence: leave-one-ID-out on first 'phase' term (T2 vs T1 coefficient)
phase_terms <- grep("^phase", names(coef(best_gee_model)), value = TRUE)
if (length(phase_terms) > 0) {
  target   <- phase_terms[1]
  base_est <- coef(best_gee_model)[target]
  ids <- unique(d$ID)
  set.seed(1)
  probe_ids <- if (length(ids) > 80) sample(ids, 80) else ids

  loo_delta <- sapply(probe_ids, function(i){
    dd <- d[d$ID != i, ]
    dd <- dd[order(dd$ID, dd$phase), ]
    fam_best <- families[[best_link]]
    fit_i <- geeglm(form, id = ID, family = fam_best, corstr = best_cor, data = dd)
    cf <- coef(fit_i); if (!target %in% names(cf)) return(NA_real_)
    cf[target] - base_est
  })
  infl_tab <- data.frame(ID = probe_ids, dBeta = loo_delta)
  infl_tab <- infl_tab[order(abs(infl_tab$dBeta), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  cat("\nTop 10 influential clusters for", target, "(|Δβ|):\n")
  print(head(infl_tab, 10), row.names = FALSE)
}

# ---- 4) Effects table with robust CIs ----------------------------
est <- coef(best_gee_model)
se  <- sqrt(diag(best_gee_model$geese$vbeta))     # robust (sandwich)
z   <- est / se
p   <- 2*pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE)

if (best_link == "logit") {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    OR  = round(exp(est), 3),
    LCL = round(exp(est - 1.96*se), 3),
    UCL = round(exp(est + 1.96*se), 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
} else {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    Estimate = round(est, 3),
    LCL = round(est - 1.96*se, 3),   # link scale
    UCL = round(est + 1.96*se, 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    Link = best_link,
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
}
cat("\nPopulation-averaged effects for best GEE model (Cardiovascular):\n"); print(OUT)

# ---- 5) Pairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) -----------
emm  <- emmeans(best_gee_model, ~ phase, vcov. = vcov(best_gee_model))   # robust vcov
cmp  <- pairs(emm, adjust = "holm")
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (", best_link, " link):\n", sep = ""); print(summary(cmp))

# Also show odds ratios if the chosen link is logit
if (best_link == "logit") {
  sc <- summary(cmp)
  OR_tab <- transform(sc,
    OR  = exp(estimate),
    LCL = exp(estimate - 1.96*SE),
    UCL = exp(estimate + 1.96*SE)
  )[ , c("contrast","OR","LCL","UCL","p.value")]
  cat("\nPairwise odds ratios (logit link):\n"); print(OR_tab, row.names = FALSE)
}

```



9. Heatwave Constitutional LGME
```{r}
## ===========================================
## RI-only GLMM (binomial) — Constitutional
## - Fit RI only
## - Compare AIC for factor / linear / quadratic time
## - ALWAYS report factor model if tied lowest
## - If factor wins → show pairwise phase contrasts
## ===========================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(emmeans)      # pairwise phase contrasts
  library(performance)  # assumption checks
})

## ---------- Prep ----------
stopifnot(all(c("Constitutional","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long)))

# Robust 0/1 coercion
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Constitutional must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (anyNA(out)) {
      bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
      stop("Unrecognized Constitutional levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
    }
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Constitutional type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d <- dat_long
d$Constitutional <- to01(d$Constitutional)

# Phase as categorical (T1 baseline)
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))

# Handle alternate column names
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(d)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(d)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# Time encodings
d$phase_num   <- as.numeric(d$phase) - 1
d$phase_num_c <- scale(d$phase_num, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)

# GLMM control
ctrl_RI <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))

## ---------- Fit competing time specifications ----------
# 1) Factor
form_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Constitutional ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_factor <- suppressMessages(
  glmer(form_factor, family = binomial, data = d, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)
)

# 2) Linear
form_linear <- as.formula(
  paste0("Constitutional ~ phase_num + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_linear <- suppressMessages(
  glmer(form_linear, family = binomial, data = d, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)
)

# 3) Quadratic
form_quad <- as.formula(
  paste0("Constitutional ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_quad <- suppressMessages(
  glmer(form_quad, family = binomial, data = d, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)
)

## ---------- AIC comparison ----------
cat("\n=== AIC: RI time specifications (Constitutional) ===\n")
aic_tab <- data.frame(
  TimeSpec = c("factor","linear","quadratic"),
  AIC      = c(AIC(fit_factor), AIC(fit_linear), AIC(fit_quad))
)
print(aic_tab[order(aic_tab$AIC), ])

## ---------- Forced selection (factor if tied lowest) ----------
tol <- 1e-8
minAIC <- min(aic_tab$AIC)
lowest <- aic_tab$TimeSpec[abs(aic_tab$AIC - minAIC) < tol]
best_timespec <- if ("factor" %in% lowest) "factor" else lowest[1]

best_glmm_RI <- switch(best_timespec,
  factor    = fit_factor,
  linear    = fit_linear,
  quadratic = fit_quad
)

cat("\n>> Reporting RI +", best_timespec, "time model (Constitutional)\n")

## ---------- Assumption checks ----------
assess_RI <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  best_glmm_RI,
  data = d,
  do_plots = TRUE,
  do_sensitivity = TRUE
)
cat("\nAssumption check — overall OK? ", assess_RI$overall_ok, "\n")

## ---------- Final summary ----------
cat("\n=== Summary of the selected RI model (Constitutional) ===\n")
print(summary(best_glmm_RI))

## ---------- Pairwise contrasts if factor ----------
if (best_timespec == "factor") {
  cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (log-odds), Holm-adjusted:\n")
  emm_fac <- emmeans(best_glmm_RI, ~ phase)
  print(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"))

  cat("\nSame contrasts as odds ratios (95% CI):\n")
  print(summary(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"),
                type = "response", infer = c(TRUE, TRUE)))
}

## ---------- Restore contrasts ----------
options(op_old)

```









9. Heatwave Constitutional GEE
```{r}
# ===========================
# GEE selection + assumptions (Constitutional outcome) - T1/T2/T3 coding
# ===========================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(geepack); library(emmeans) })

# ---- 0) Clean & sort --------------------------------------------
base_df <- dat_long

vars <- c("Constitutional","phase","Age_Group","Gender","Family_Size_Group",
          "Monthly_Income_Group","HH_Area","HTN_prior","Asthma_prior",
          "Thyroid_prior","CVDs_prior","ID")
d <- na.omit(base_df[, vars])
d <- droplevels(d)
stopifnot(!anyNA(d$ID))

# Robust 0/1 coercion
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) { ux <- sort(unique(x)); if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Constitutional must be 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", ")) }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (any(is.na(out))) stop("Unrecognized Constitutional levels for 0/1 mapping.")
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Constitutional type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d$Constitutional <- to01(d$Constitutional)

# T1/T2/T3 treatment contrasts
want_lvls <- c("T1","T2","T3")
if (!all(want_lvls %in% levels(d$phase))) {
  stop("phase must include T1,T2,T3; found: ", paste(levels(d$phase), collapse=", "))
}
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = want_lvls, ordered = FALSE)
contrasts(d$phase) <- stats::contr.treatment(n = length(levels(d$phase)), base = 1)

# waves for AR(1) & sort
d$wave <- as.integer(d$phase)  # T1=1, T2=2, T3=3
d <- d[order(d$ID, d$phase), ]

# Common formula
form <- Constitutional ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + Family_Size_Group + Monthly_Income_Group +
  HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior

# ---- 1) Fit grid: working correlation × link ---------------------
cor_opts <- c("independence","exchangeable","ar1","unstructured")
families <- list(
  logit   = stats::binomial(link = "logit"),
  probit  = stats::binomial(link = "probit"),
  cloglog = stats::binomial(link = "cloglog")
)

fits <- list(); rows <- list()
for (cc in cor_opts) {
  for (lname in names(families)) {
    fam <- families[[lname]]
    key <- paste(cc, lname, sep = "_")
    fit <- geeglm(form, id = ID, waves = wave, family = fam, corstr = cc, data = d)
    qic <- geepack::QIC(fit)
    fits[[key]] <- fit
    rows[[key]] <- data.frame(Correlation = cc, Link = lname,
                              QIC = unname(qic[["QIC"]]),
                              QICu = if (!is.null(qic[["QICu"]])) unname(qic[["QICu"]]) else NA_real_)
  }
}
sel_tab <- do.call(rbind, rows); row.names(sel_tab) <- NULL
sel_tab <- sel_tab[order(sel_tab$QIC), ]
cat("\nModel selection grid (lower QIC is better):\n"); print(sel_tab)

best_idx  <- which.min(sel_tab$QIC)
best_cor  <- sel_tab$Correlation[best_idx]
best_link <- sel_tab$Link[best_idx]
best_gee_model <- fits[[paste(best_cor, best_link, sep = "_")]]
cat("\nBest: correlation =", best_cor, ", link =", best_link,
    " (QIC =", round(sel_tab$QIC[best_idx], 3),
    if (!is.na(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx])) paste0(", QICu = ", round(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx], 3)) else "",
    ")\n")

# Full model summary
cat("\n=== Summary of the best GEE model (Constitutional) ===\n")
print(summary(best_gee_model))

# ---- 2) Slide-style table (logit only) ---------------------------
if (!is.null(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])) {
  qic_log <- c(
    Unstructured              = geepack::QIC(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `Constant (Exchangeable)` = geepack::QIC(fits[["exchangeable_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `AR(1)`                   = geepack::QIC(fits[["ar1_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    Independence              = geepack::QIC(fits[["independence_logit"]])[["QIC"]]
  )
  pres_tab <- data.frame(Correlation = names(qic_log),
                         `QIC (logit)` = round(unname(qic_log), 1),
                         check.names = FALSE)
  cat("\nWorking correlation comparison (logit only):\n"); print(pres_tab)
}

# ---- 3) Diagnostics ----------------------------------------------
n_clusters <- length(unique(d$ID))
cat("\n# Clusters:", n_clusters, "\n")
cat("Cluster-size distribution:\n"); print(table(table(d$ID)))

wcv <- tapply(d$phase, d$ID, function(x) length(unique(x)))
cat("Proportion of clusters with >1 phase level:", round(mean(wcv > 1), 3), "\n")

tab_phase <- xtabs(~ Constitutional + phase, data = d)
cat("\nContingency of Constitutional by phase:\n"); print(tab_phase)

phi <- sum(residuals(best_gee_model, type = "pearson")^2) / (nrow(d) - length(coef(best_gee_model)))
cat("\nPearson scale (phi):", round(phi, 3), " ( >1 suggests overdispersion )\n")

if (!is.null(best_gee_model$geese$alpha)) {
  cat("Estimated working correlation (alpha):", round(best_gee_model$geese$alpha, 3), "\n")
}

# Influence: leave-one-ID-out on first 'phase' term (usually phaseT2)
phase_terms <- grep("^phase", names(coef(best_gee_model)), value = TRUE)
if (length(phase_terms) > 0) {
  target   <- phase_terms[1]
  base_est <- coef(best_gee_model)[target]
  ids <- unique(d$ID)
  set.seed(1)
  probe_ids <- if (length(ids) > 80) sample(ids, 80) else ids
  loo_delta <- sapply(probe_ids, function(i){
    dd <- d[d$ID != i, ]
    dd <- dd[order(dd$ID, dd$phase), ]
    fam_best <- families[[best_link]]
    fit_i <- geeglm(form, id = ID, waves = wave, family = fam_best, corstr = best_cor, data = dd)
    cf <- coef(fit_i); if (!target %in% names(cf)) return(NA_real_)
    cf[target] - base_est
  })
  infl_tab <- data.frame(ID = probe_ids, dBeta = loo_delta)
  infl_tab <- infl_tab[order(abs(infl_tab$dBeta), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  cat("\nTop 10 influential clusters for", target, "(|Δβ|):\n")
  print(head(infl_tab, 10), row.names = FALSE)
}

# ---- 4) Effects table with robust CIs ----------------------------
est <- coef(best_gee_model)
se  <- sqrt(diag(best_gee_model$geese$vbeta))   # robust (sandwich)
z   <- est / se
p   <- 2*pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE)

if (best_link == "logit") {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    OR  = round(exp(est), 3),
    LCL = round(exp(est - 1.96*se), 3),
    UCL = round(exp(est + 1.96*se), 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
} else {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    Estimate = round(est, 3),
    LCL = round(est - 1.96*se, 3),   # link scale
    UCL = round(est + 1.96*se, 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    Link = best_link,
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
}
cat("\nPopulation-averaged effects for best GEE model (Constitutional):\n"); print(OUT)

# ---- 5) Pairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) -----------
# Use ROBUST covariance in emmeans
emm  <- emmeans(best_gee_model, ~ phase, vcov. = best_gee_model$geese$vbeta)
cmp  <- pairs(emm, adjust = "holm")
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (", best_link, " link):\n", sep = ""); print(summary(cmp))

# Also show odds ratios if the chosen link is logit
if (best_link == "logit") {
  sc <- summary(cmp)
  OR_tab <- transform(sc,
    OR  = exp(estimate),
    LCL = exp(estimate - 1.96*SE),
    UCL = exp(estimate + 1.96*SE)
  )[ , c("contrast","OR","LCL","UCL","p.value")]
  cat("\nPairwise odds ratios (logit link):\n"); print(OR_tab, row.names = FALSE)
}

cat("\nCoefficient names:\n"); print(names(coef(best_gee_model)))

```



10. Heatwave Psychological LGME (RI)
```{r}
## ===========================================
## RI-only GLMM (binomial) — Psychological
## Time effect selection (factor / linear / quad)
## Tie rule: if factor ties for lowest AIC → choose factor
## If factor wins → show pairwise phase contrasts
## ===========================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(emmeans)      # pairwise phase contrasts
  library(performance)  # check_glmm_assumptions()
})

## ---------- Prep ----------
stopifnot(all(c("Psychological","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long)))

# Robust 0/1 coercion
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Psychological must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (anyNA(out)) {
      bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
      stop("Unrecognized Psychological levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
    }
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Psychological type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d <- dat_long
d$Psychological <- to01(d$Psychological)

# Phase as categorical (T1 reference); avoid polynomial contrasts
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))

# Be tolerant to alternate column names
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(d)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(d)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# Time encodings
d$phase_num   <- as.numeric(d$phase) - 1                  # 0,1,2
d$phase_num_c <- scale(d$phase_num, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)

# GLMM control
ctrl_RI <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))

## ---------- Fit competing time specifications ----------
# 1) Factor (T2/T3 vs T1)
form_RI_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Psychological ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_factor <- suppressMessages(
  glmer(form_RI_factor, family = binomial, data = d, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)
)

# 2) Linear time (0→1→2)
form_RI_linear <- as.formula(
  paste0("Psychological ~ phase_num + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_linear <- suppressMessages(
  glmer(form_RI_linear, family = binomial, data = d, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)
)

# 3) Quadratic time (centered linear + square)
form_RI_quad <- as.formula(
  paste0("Psychological ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_quad <- suppressMessages(
  glmer(form_RI_quad, family = binomial, data = d, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)
)

## ---------- Select winner by AIC (force factor if tied lowest) ----------
aic_tab <- data.frame(
  TimeSpec = c("factor","linear","quadratic"),
  AIC      = c(AIC(fit_RI_factor), AIC(fit_RI_linear), AIC(fit_RI_quad))
)
aic_tab <- aic_tab[order(aic_tab$AIC), ]
print(aic_tab)

tol <- 1e-8
minAIC <- min(aic_tab$AIC)
lowest <- aic_tab$TimeSpec[abs(aic_tab$AIC - minAIC) < tol]

best_timespec <- if ("factor" %in% lowest) "factor" else lowest[1]
best_glmm_RI <- switch(best_timespec,
  factor    = fit_RI_factor,
  linear    = fit_RI_linear,
  quadratic = fit_RI_quad
)

cat("\n>> RI winner by AIC (factor prioritized on ties):", best_timespec,
    " (AIC =", AIC(best_glmm_RI), ")\n")

## ---------- Assumption checks on the SELECTED model ----------
assess_RI <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  best_glmm_RI,
  data = d,
  do_plots = TRUE,         # DHARMa-style residual checks
  do_sensitivity = TRUE    # GLM-CRSE / GEE comparison summary
)
cat("\nAssumption check — overall OK? ", assess_RI$overall_ok, "\n")
cat("Sensitivity agreement (GLM-CRSE, GEE):\n")
print(assess_RI$sensitivity$agreement)

## ---------- Final summary ----------
cat("\n=== Summary of the selected RI model (Psychological) ===\n")
print(summary(best_glmm_RI))

## ---------- If FACTOR wins → show pairwise contrasts ----------
if (best_timespec == "factor") {
  cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (log-odds), Holm-adjusted:\n")
  emm_fac <- emmeans(best_glmm_RI, ~ phase)
  print(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"))

  cat("\nSame contrasts as odds ratios (95% CI):\n")
  print(summary(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"),
                type = "response", infer = c(TRUE, TRUE)))
}

## ---------- Restore previous contrast settings ----------
options(op_old)

```




10. Heatwave Psychological GEE
```{r}
# ===========================
# GEE selection + assumptions (Psychological outcome) - T1/T2/T3 coding
# ===========================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(geepack); library(emmeans) })

# ---- 0) Clean & sort --------------------------------------------
base_df <- dat_long

# allow for grouped or raw versions of family size & income
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(base_df)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(base_df)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

vars <- c("Psychological","phase","Age_Group","Gender", fam_sz, inc,
          "HH_Area","HTN_prior","Asthma_prior","Thyroid_prior","CVDs_prior","ID")
d <- na.omit(base_df[, vars])
d <- droplevels(d)
stopifnot(!anyNA(d$ID))

# Robust 0/1 coercion for the binary outcome
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) { ux <- sort(unique(x)); if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Psychological must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", ")) }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (any(is.na(out))) {
      bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
      stop("Unrecognized Psychological levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
    }
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Psychological type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d$Psychological <- to01(d$Psychological)

# T1/T2/T3 treatment contrasts (T1 reference)
want_lvls <- c("T1","T2","T3")
if (!all(want_lvls %in% levels(d$phase))) {
  stop("phase must have levels T1, T2, T3; found: ", paste(levels(d$phase), collapse=", "))
}
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = want_lvls, ordered = FALSE)
contrasts(d$phase) <- stats::contr.treatment(n = length(levels(d$phase)), base = 1)

# AR(1) wave index + sort
d$wave <- as.integer(d$phase)  # T1=1, T2=2, T3=3
d <- d[order(d$ID, d$phase), ]

# Common formula (same covariates as your GLMMs)
form <- as.formula(sprintf(
  "Psychological ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + %s + %s + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior",
  fam_sz, inc
))

# ---- 1) Fit grid: working correlation × link ---------------------
cor_opts <- c("independence","exchangeable","ar1","unstructured")
families <- list(
  logit   = stats::binomial(link = "logit"),
  probit  = stats::binomial(link = "probit"),
  cloglog = stats::binomial(link = "cloglog")
)

fits <- list(); rows <- list()
for (cc in cor_opts) {
  for (lname in names(families)) {
    fam <- families[[lname]]
    key <- paste(cc, lname, sep = "_")
    fit <- geeglm(form, id = ID, waves = wave, family = fam, corstr = cc, data = d)
    qic <- geepack::QIC(fit)
    fits[[key]] <- fit
    rows[[key]] <- data.frame(Correlation = cc, Link = lname,
                              QIC = unname(qic[["QIC"]]),
                              QICu = if (!is.null(qic[["QICu"]])) unname(qic[["QICu"]]) else NA_real_)
  }
}
sel_tab <- do.call(rbind, rows); row.names(sel_tab) <- NULL
sel_tab <- sel_tab[order(sel_tab$QIC), ]
cat("\nModel selection grid (lower QIC is better):\n"); print(sel_tab)

best_idx  <- which.min(sel_tab$QIC)
best_cor  <- sel_tab$Correlation[best_idx]
best_link <- sel_tab$Link[best_idx]
best_gee_model <- fits[[paste(best_cor, best_link, sep = "_")]]
cat("\nBest: correlation =", best_cor, ", link =", best_link,
    " (QIC =", round(sel_tab$QIC[best_idx], 3),
    if (!is.na(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx])) paste0(", QICu = ", round(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx], 3)) else "",
    ")\n")

# Full model summary
cat("\n=== Summary of the best GEE model (Psychological) ===\n")
print(summary(best_gee_model))

# ---- 2) Slide-style table (logit only) ---------------------------
if (!is.null(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])) {
  qic_log <- c(
    Unstructured              = geepack::QIC(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `Constant (Exchangeable)` = geepack::QIC(fits[["exchangeable_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `AR(1)`                   = geepack::QIC(fits[["ar1_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    Independence              = geepack::QIC(fits[["independence_logit"]])[["QIC"]]
  )
  pres_tab <- data.frame(Correlation = names(qic_log),
                         `QIC (logit)` = round(unname(qic_log), 1),
                         check.names = FALSE)
  cat("\nWorking correlation comparison (logit only):\n"); print(pres_tab)
}

# ---- 3) Diagnostics ----------------------------------------------
n_clusters <- length(unique(d$ID))
cat("\n# Clusters:", n_clusters, "\n")
cat("Cluster-size distribution:\n"); print(table(table(d$ID)))

wcv <- tapply(d$phase, d$ID, function(x) length(unique(x)))
cat("Proportion of clusters with >1 phase level:", round(mean(wcv > 1), 3), "\n")

tab_phase <- xtabs(~ Psychological + phase, data = d)
cat("\nContingency of Psychological by phase:\n"); print(tab_phase)
if (any(apply(tab_phase, 2, function(col) any(col == 0)))) {
  warning("Zero cell(s) detected for some phase levels (check separation).")
}

phi <- sum(residuals(best_gee_model, type = "pearson")^2) / (nrow(d) - length(coef(best_gee_model)))
cat("\nPearson scale (phi):", round(phi, 3), " ( >1 suggests overdispersion )\n")

if (!is.null(best_gee_model$geese$alpha)) {
  cat("Estimated working correlation (alpha):", round(best_gee_model$geese$alpha, 3), "\n")
}

# Influence: leave-one-ID-out on first 'phase' term (usually phaseT2)
phase_terms <- grep("^phase", names(coef(best_gee_model)), value = TRUE)
if (length(phase_terms) > 0) {
  target   <- phase_terms[1]
  base_est <- coef(best_gee_model)[target]
  ids <- unique(d$ID)
  set.seed(1)
  probe_ids <- if (length(ids) > 80) sample(ids, 80) else ids
  loo_delta <- sapply(probe_ids, function(i){
    dd <- d[d$ID != i, ]
    dd <- dd[order(dd$ID, dd$phase), ]
    fam_best <- families[[best_link]]
    fit_i <- geeglm(form, id = ID, waves = wave, family = fam_best, corstr = best_cor, data = dd)
    cf <- coef(fit_i); if (!target %in% names(cf)) return(NA_real_)
    cf[target] - base_est
  })
  infl_tab <- data.frame(ID = probe_ids, dBeta = loo_delta)
  infl_tab <- infl_tab[order(abs(infl_tab$dBeta), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  cat("\nTop 10 influential clusters for", target, "(|Δβ|):\n")
  print(head(infl_tab, 10), row.names = FALSE)
}

# ---- 4) Effects table with robust CIs ----------------------------
est <- coef(best_gee_model)
se  <- sqrt(diag(best_gee_model$geese$vbeta))     # robust (sandwich)
z   <- est / se
p   <- 2*pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE)

if (best_link == "logit") {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    OR  = round(exp(est), 3),
    LCL = round(exp(est - 1.96*se), 3),
    UCL = round(exp(est + 1.96*se), 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
} else {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    Estimate = round(est, 3),
    LCL = round(est - 1.96*se, 3),   # link scale
    UCL = round(est + 1.96*se, 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    Link = best_link,
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
}
cat("\nPopulation-averaged effects for best GEE model (Psychological):\n"); print(OUT)

# ---- 5) Pairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) -----------
# Use robust covariance in emmeans
emm  <- emmeans(best_gee_model, ~ phase, vcov. = best_gee_model$geese$vbeta)
cmp  <- pairs(emm, adjust = "holm")
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (", best_link, " link):\n", sep = ""); print(summary(cmp))

# Also show odds ratios if the chosen link is logit
if (best_link == "logit") {
  sc <- summary(cmp)
  OR_tab <- transform(sc,
    OR  = exp(estimate),
    LCL = exp(estimate - 1.96*SE),
    UCL = exp(estimate + 1.96*SE)
  )[ , c("contrast","OR","LCL","UCL","p.value")]
  cat("\nPairwise odds ratios (logit link):\n"); print(OR_tab, row.names = FALSE)
}

cat("\nCoefficient names:\n"); print(names(coef(best_gee_model)))

```

```{r}
library(readr)

df_wide <- read_csv(
  'data/private/NCD_Data_clean_categories.csv',
  skip = 4,
  locale = locale(encoding = "latin1")
)

serverity_df = read.csv('data/private/HW_DS_Severity_Scale.csv', skip = 0)



df_ds_wide <- df_wide[ , -3]
df_ds_wide <- df_wide[1:(nrow(df_wide)-3), ]
df_ds_wide = cbind(df_ds_wide, serverity_df)
df_ds_wide <- df_ds_wide[, c(
  "T1_NCD_ID",
  "T1_D_Age",
  "T1_D_age_group",
  "T1_D_gender",
  "T1_D_family_size",
  "T1_D_monthly_income",
  "T1_L_household_area_categorical",

  "T1_M_clin_diagnosis",

  "T1_HW_9.2_impact_descriptive...67",
  "T1_DS_9.4_impact_descriptive",
  "T1_DS_symptom_severity_score",

  "T2_DS_2.3_impact_binary",
  "T2_DS_2.4_impact_descriptive",
  "T2_DS_symptom_severity_score",

  "T3_DS_2.3_impact_binary",
  "T3_DS_2.4_impact_descriptive",
  "T3_DS_symptom_severity_score"

)]
colnames(df_ds_wide) = c("ID","Age","Age_Group","Gender","Family_Size","Monthly_Income","HH_Area","Prior_Diagnosis","T1_DS_Affected","T1_DS_Condition","T1_DS_symptom_severity_score","T2_DS_Affected","T2_DS_Condition","T2_DS_symptom_severity_score","T3_DS_Affected","T3_DS_Condition","T3_DS_symptom_severity_score")

library(dplyr)

df_ds_wide$Monthly_Income <- df_ds_wide$Monthly_Income |>
  # Replace all dash-like characters with normal dash
  (\(x) gsub("[\u0096–—]", "-", x))() |>
  # Remove extra spaces around dash
  (\(x) gsub("\\s*-\\s*", " - ", x))() |>
  # Fix "less than100"
  (\(x) gsub("less than ?100", "less than 100", x, ignore.case = TRUE))() |>
  # Trim leading/trailing spaces
  trimws() |>
  # Make factor
  (\(x) factor(x, levels = c(
    "less than 100 JD",
    "100 - 200 JD",
    "200 - 300 JD",
    "more than 300 JD"
  )))()


# Check the first few rows of the data
head(df_ds_wide,10)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

# If a non-time-varying Affected exists, rename it so it won’t mask the pivot result
if ("Affected" %in% names(df_ds_wide)) {
  df_ds_wide <- df_ds_wide %>% dplyr::rename(Affected_overall = Affected)
}

dat_long_ds <- df_ds_wide %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    # Grab Affected, Condition, and severity across T1/T2/T3 for DS
    cols = tidyselect::matches("^T[123]_DS_(Affected|Condition|symptom_severity_score)$"),
    names_to      = c("phase", ".value"),
    # Drop the "DS_" prefix and capture phase number
    names_pattern = "^T([123])_DS_(.*)$"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    phase = factor(paste0("T", phase), levels = c("T1","T2","T3")),
    Affected = case_when(
      is.na(Affected) ~ NA_real_,
      Affected %in% c(1, "1") ~ 1,
      Affected %in% c(0, "0") ~ 0,
      str_to_upper(str_trim(Affected)) %in% c("YES","Y","TRUE","T") ~ 1,
      str_to_upper(str_trim(Affected)) %in% c("NO","N","FALSE","F") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ) %>% as.integer()
  ) %>%
  # After the regex, columns will be: Affected, Condition, symptom_severity_score
  dplyr::select(
    ID, Age, Age_Group, Gender, Family_Size, Monthly_Income, HH_Area,
    phase, Affected, Condition, symptom_severity_score, Prior_Diagnosis
    # (Optionally include dataset_type if you've added it earlier)
    # , dataset_type
  )

# quick sanity checks
head(dat_long_ds, 10)
count(dat_long_ds, phase, !is.na(symptom_severity_score))
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)

# --- Keyword lists for categories ---
category_keywords <- list(
  Dyspnea              = c("DYSPNEA"),
  Fatigue              = c("FATIGUE"),
  Headache             = c("HEADACHE"),
  Sweating             = c("SWEATING"),
  Allergy              = c("ALLERGY"),
  Hypertension         = c("HYPERTENSION"),

  # HTN and related terms
  HTN_prior         = c("HTN", "GESTATIONAL HTN"),

  # Asthma, Thyroid, and CVDs
  Asthma_prior               = c("ASTHMA"),
  Thyroid_prior              = c("THYROID DISORDERS"),
  CVDs_prior                 = c(
    "CVD",
    "CVDS",
    "IHD",
    "HF",
    "CVDS(HF)",
    "CVDS(DVT)",
    "CVDS(HYPERTRIGLYCERIDMIA)",
    "CVDS(MVP)",
    "CVDS(CARDIAC VALVE REPLACEMENT)",
    "CVDS(CARDIOVASCULAR)",
    "CVDS ( AR GRADE II )",
    "CVDS ( CARDIOVASCULAR )"
  ),

  Respiratory          = c("COUGH", "TIGHTNESS", "CYANOSIS", "RESPIRATORY"),
  Neurologic           = c("CONVULSION", "NUMBNESS", "DIZZINESS", "NEUROLOGIC"),
  Gastrointestinal     = c("NAUSEA", "VOMITING", "ABDOMINAL PAIN", "GASTROINTESTINAL"),
  Psychological        = c("STRESS", "NERVOUS", "PSYCHOLOGICAL FATIGUE", "INSOMNIA", "PSYCHOLOGICAL"),
  Musculoskeletal      = c("JOINT PAIN", "FOOT PAIN", "MUSCULOSKELETAL"),
  Ocular               = c("REDNESS OF EYES", "EYE PAIN", "POOR VISION", "BLURRED VISION", "OCULAR"),
  Metabolic            = c("HYPERGLYCEMIA", "HYPOGLYCEMIA", "HYPERURICEMIA", "METABOLIC"),
  Cardiovascular       = c("HEART ATTACK", "CHEST PAIN", "PALPITATIONS", "TACHYCARDIA", "EDEMA",
                           "HYPERTENSION", "CARDIOVASCULAR"),
  Constitutional       = c("FEVER", "XEROSTOMIA", "RUNNY NOSE", "LACK OF APPETITE", "COMA",
                           "THIRSTY", "CONSTITUTIONAL")
)

# --- Function to process two columns with keywords ---
process_both <- function(df, col1, col2, category_keywords) {
  # Ensure columns exist
  if (!all(c(col1, col2) %in% names(df))) {
    stop(sprintf(
      "Missing columns: %s",
      paste(setdiff(c(col1, col2), names(df)), collapse = ", ")
    ))
  }

  n <- nrow(df)

  # Normalize text, split into tokens
  mk_list <- function(x) {
    x <- toupper(as.character(x))
    x[is.na(x)] <- ""
    # Normalize separators: commas or slashes → comma
    x <- gsub("\\s*[,/]+\\s*", ",", x)
    # Split into tokens
    strsplit(trimws(x), ",", fixed = FALSE)
  }

  L1 <- mk_list(df[[col1]])
  L2 <- mk_list(df[[col2]])

  for (cat in names(category_keywords)) {
    kws <- toupper(category_keywords[[cat]])
    df[[cat]] <- vapply(seq_len(n), function(i) {
      vals <- unique(c(L1[[i]], L2[[i]]))
      vals <- vals[vals != ""]
      as.integer(any(vals %in% kws))
    }, integer(1))
  }
  df
}

# --- Apply to dat_long_ds (duststorm long dataset) ---
dat_long_ds <- process_both(
  dat_long_ds,
  col1 = "Condition",
  col2 = "Prior_Diagnosis",
  category_keywords = category_keywords
)

# Preview results
head(dat_long_ds, 20)

```



From this step, we have the DS dataframe now

```{r}
)

  dat_long_ds$Monthly_Income %in% c("200 - 300 JD", "more than 300 JD"),
  "200 JD or more",
  as.character(dat_long_ds$Monthly_Income)
)

dat_long_ds$Monthly_Income_Group <- factor(
  dat_long_ds$Monthly_Income_Group,
  levels = c("less than 100 JD", "100 - 200 JD", "200 JD or more")
)

table(dat_long_ds$Monthly_Income_Group)
```

```{R}
vars <- c(
  "phase", "Age_Group", "Gender", "Family_Size", "Monthly_Income",
  "HH_Area", "symptom_severity_score",
  "HTN_prior", "Asthma_prior", "Thyroid_prior", "CVDs_prior"
)

  cat("\n===== ", v, " =====\n")
  print(table(dat_long_ds[[v]]))

```



```{R}
vars <- c(
  "phase", "Age_Group", "Gender", "Family_Size", "Monthly_Income",
  "HH_Area", "symptom_severity_score",
  "HTN_prior", "Asthma_prior", "Thyroid_prior", "CVDs_prior"
)

for (v in vars) {
  cat("\n===== ", v, " =====\n")
  print(table(dat_long_ds$Affected, dat_long_ds[[v]]))
}
```
