```{r}
# List of outcome variables
outcomes <- c("Dyspnea", "Fatigue", "Headache", "Sweating", "Allergy", "Hypertension")

# Initialize storage
res_list <- list()

for (var in outcomes) {
  if (!var %in% names(dat_long_ds)) next

  tab <- table(dat_long_ds[[var]])
  prop <- prop.table(tab)

  res_list[[var]] <- data.frame(
    Outcome   = var,
    Count_0   = ifelse("0" %in% names(tab), tab[["0"]], 0),
    Count_1   = ifelse("1" %in% names(tab), tab[["1"]], 0),
    Percent_0 = ifelse("0" %in% names(tab), round(100*prop[["0"]],2), 0),
    Percent_1 = ifelse("1" %in% names(tab), round(100*prop[["1"]],2), 0)
  )
}

# Combine all into one table
summary_tab <- do.call(rbind, res_list)
print(summary_tab, row.names = FALSE)


```


```{r}
# ----------------------------------------
# Quick frequency check for duststorm symptoms
# ----------------------------------------

# Variables of interest
vars <- c("Affected","Respiratory","Neurologic","Gastrointestinal",
          "Psychological","Musculoskeletal","Ocular",
          "Metabolic","Cardiovascular","Constitutional")

# Loop through each variable and print counts + percentages
for (v in vars) {
  cat("\n===== ", v, " =====\n")
  tab <- table(dat_long_ds[[v]], useNA = "ifany")
  pct <- round(100 * prop.table(tab), 1)
  print(cbind(Count = tab, Percent = pct))
}

```







1. DS Model LGME (RI)
```{r}
## ============================
## RI-only GLMM: select time effect → check assumptions → summarize
##   Outcome: Affected  (duststorm)
## ============================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(emmeans)      # for phase contrasts if factor time wins
  library(performance)  # for check_glmm_assumptions()
})

## --- Prep ---
stopifnot(all(c("Affected","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long_ds)))
dat_long_ds$Affected <- as.integer(dat_long_ds$Affected)

# Phase as categorical T1/T2/T3 (T1 baseline)
dat_long_ds$phase <- factor(dat_long_ds$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))

# Be tolerant to alternate column names
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# Numeric encodings for time
dat_long_ds$phase_num   <- as.numeric(factor(dat_long_ds$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"))) - 1  # 0,1,2
dat_long_ds$phase_num_c <- scale(dat_long_ds$phase_num, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)

ctrl_RI <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))

## --- Fit RI models with different time effects ---

# 1) Factor (response profile: T2/T3 vs T1)
form_RI_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Affected ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_factor <- glmer(form_RI_factor, family = binomial, data = dat_long_ds,
                       nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# 2) Linear time (0→1→2)
form_RI_linear <- as.formula(
  paste0("Affected ~ phase_num + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_linear <- glmer(form_RI_linear, family = binomial, data = dat_long_ds,
                       nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# 3) Quadratic time (centered linear + square)
form_RI_quad <- as.formula(
  paste0("Affected ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_quad <- glmer(form_RI_quad, family = binomial, data = dat_long_ds,
                     nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

## --- Select winner by AIC ---
aic_tab <- data.frame(
  TimeSpec = c("factor","linear","quadratic"),
  AIC      = c(AIC(fit_RI_factor), AIC(fit_RI_linear), AIC(fit_RI_quad))
)
aic_tab <- aic_tab[order(aic_tab$AIC), ]
print(aic_tab)

lowest_AIC <- min(aic_tab$AIC)
best_timespec <- aic_tab$TimeSpec[1]

best_glmm_RI <- switch(best_timespec,
  factor    = fit_RI_factor,
  linear    = fit_RI_linear,
  quadratic = fit_RI_quad
)

cat("\n>> RI winner by AIC:", best_timespec, " (AIC =", AIC(best_glmm_RI), ")\n")

## --- Assumption checks on the SELECTED model ---
assess_RI <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  best_glmm_RI,
  data = dat_long_ds,
  do_plots = TRUE,
  do_sensitivity = TRUE
)

cat("\nAssumption check — overall OK? ", assess_RI$overall_ok, "\n")
cat("Sensitivity agreement (GLM-CRSE, GEE):\n")
print(assess_RI$sensitivity$agreement)

## --- Final summary of the SELECTED model ---
cat("\n=== Summary of the selected RI model (Affected, duststorm) ===\n")
print(summary(best_glmm_RI))

## --- If FACTOR time won, show T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2 contrasts ---
if (best_timespec == "factor") {
  cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (log-odds), Holm-adjusted:\n")
  emm_fac <- emmeans(best_glmm_RI, ~ phase)
  print(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"))

  cat("\nSame contrasts as odds ratios (95% CI):\n")
  print(summary(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"), type = "response", infer = c(TRUE, TRUE)))
}

## (Optional) restore previous contrast settings
options(op_old)


```


1. DS GEE model
```{r}
# ===========================
# GEE selection + assumptions (Affected outcome) - T1/T2/T3 coding
# ===========================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(geepack); library(emmeans) })

# ---- 0) Clean & sort --------------------------------------------
# allow for grouped or raw versions of family size & income
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

vars <- c("Affected","phase","Age_Group","Gender", fam_sz, inc,
          "HH_Area","HTN_prior","Asthma_prior","Thyroid_prior","ID")

d <- na.omit(dat_long_ds[, vars])
d <- droplevels(d)

# Robust 0/1 coercion for the binary outcome
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Affected must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (any(is.na(out))) {
      bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
      stop("Unrecognized Affected levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
    }
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Affected type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d$Affected <- to01(d$Affected)

# Use treatment contrasts (T1 reference)
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)

# Sort so AR(1) can infer spacing by row order (if chosen)
d <- d[order(d$ID, d$phase), ]

# Common formula (same covariates as your GLMM)
form <- as.formula(sprintf(
  "Affected ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + %s + %s + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior",
  fam_sz, inc
))

# ---- 1) Fit grid: working correlation × link ---------------------
cor_opts <- c("independence","exchangeable","ar1","unstructured")
families <- list(
  logit   = stats::binomial(link = "logit"),
  probit  = stats::binomial(link = "probit"),
  cloglog = stats::binomial(link = "cloglog")
)

fits <- list(); rows <- list()
for (cc in cor_opts) {
  for (lname in names(families)) {
    fam <- families[[lname]]
    key <- paste(cc, lname, sep = "_")
    fit <- geeglm(form, id = ID, family = fam, corstr = cc, data = d)
    qic <- geepack::QIC(fit)
    fits[[key]] <- fit
    rows[[key]] <- data.frame(Correlation = cc, Link = lname,
                              QIC = unname(qic[["QIC"]]),
                              QICu = if (!is.null(qic[["QICu"]])) unname(qic[["QICu"]]) else NA_real_)
  }
}
sel_tab <- do.call(rbind, rows)
row.names(sel_tab) <- NULL
sel_tab <- sel_tab[order(sel_tab$QIC), ]
cat("\nModel selection grid (lower QIC is better):\n"); print(sel_tab)

best_idx  <- which.min(sel_tab$QIC)
best_cor  <- sel_tab$Correlation[best_idx]
best_link <- sel_tab$Link[best_idx]
fit_best  <- fits[[paste(best_cor, best_link, sep = "_")]]

cat("\nBest: correlation =", best_cor, ", link =", best_link,
    " (QIC =", round(sel_tab$QIC[best_idx], 3),
    if (!is.na(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx])) paste0(", QICu = ", round(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx], 3)) else "",
    ")\n")

# Save the selected model and show a summary
best_gee_model <- fit_best
summary(best_gee_model)

# ---- 2) Slide-style table (logit only) ---------------------------
if (!is.null(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])) {
  qic_log <- c(
    Unstructured              = geepack::QIC(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `Constant (Exchangeable)` = geepack::QIC(fits[["exchangeable_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `AR(1)`                   = geepack::QIC(fits[["ar1_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    Independence              = geepack::QIC(fits[["independence_logit"]])[["QIC"]]
  )
  pres_tab <- data.frame(Correlation = names(qic_log),
                         `QIC (logit)` = round(unname(qic_log), 1),
                         check.names = FALSE)
  cat("\nWorking correlation comparison (logit only):\n"); print(pres_tab)
}

# ---- 3) Diagnostics ----------------------------------------------
# 3a) Clusters & size
n_clusters <- length(unique(d$ID))
cat("\n# Clusters:", n_clusters, "\n")
cat("Cluster-size distribution:\n"); print(table(table(d$ID)))

# 3b) Within-ID variation for 'phase'
wcv <- tapply(d$phase, d$ID, function(x) length(unique(x)))
cat("Proportion of clusters with >1 phase level:", round(mean(wcv > 1), 3), "\n")

# 3c) Sparse cells / separation check for phase
tab_phase <- xtabs(~ Affected + phase, data = d)
cat("\nContingency of Affected by phase:\n"); print(tab_phase)

# 3d) Overdispersion (binomial quasi-likelihood)
phi <- sum(residuals(best_gee_model, type = "pearson")^2) / (nrow(d) - length(coef(best_gee_model)))
cat("\nPearson scale (phi):", round(phi, 3), " ( >1 suggests overdispersion )\n")

# 3e) Estimated working correlation
if (!is.null(best_gee_model$geese$alpha)) {
  cat("Estimated working correlation (alpha):", round(best_gee_model$geese$alpha, 3), "\n")
}

# 3f) Influence: leave-one-ID-out on first 'phase' term (T2 vs T1 coefficient)
phase_terms <- grep("^phase", names(coef(best_gee_model)), value = TRUE)
if (length(phase_terms) > 0) {
  target   <- phase_terms[1]
  base_est <- coef(best_gee_model)[target]
  ids <- unique(d$ID)
  set.seed(1)
  probe_ids <- if (length(ids) > 80) sample(ids, 80) else ids

  loo_delta <- sapply(probe_ids, function(i){
    dd <- d[d$ID != i, ]
    dd <- dd[order(dd$ID, dd$phase), ]
    fam_best <- families[[best_link]]
    fit_i <- geeglm(form, id = ID, family = fam_best, corstr = best_cor, data = dd)
    cf <- coef(fit_i); if (!target %in% names(cf)) return(NA_real_)
    cf[target] - base_est
  })
  infl_tab <- data.frame(ID = probe_ids, dBeta = loo_delta)
  infl_tab <- infl_tab[order(abs(infl_tab$dBeta), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  cat("\nTop 10 influential clusters for", target, "(|Δβ|):\n")
  print(head(infl_tab, 10), row.names = FALSE)
}

# ---- 4) Effects table with robust CIs ----------------------------
est <- coef(best_gee_model)
se  <- sqrt(diag(best_gee_model$geese$vbeta))     # robust (sandwich)
z   <- est / se
p   <- 2*pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE)

if (best_link == "logit") {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    OR  = round(exp(est), 3),
    LCL = round(exp(est - 1.96*se), 3),
    UCL = round(exp(est + 1.96*se), 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
} else {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    Estimate = round(est, 3),
    LCL = round(est - 1.96*se), 3,
    UCL = round(est + 1.96*se), 3,
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    Link = best_link,
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
}
cat("\nPopulation-averaged effects for best GEE model (Affected):\n"); print(OUT)

# ---- 5) Pairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) -----------
# Use model's covariance; for robust in emmeans you can pass best_gee_model$geese$vbeta
emm  <- emmeans(best_gee_model, ~ phase, vcov. = vcov(best_gee_model))
cmp  <- pairs(emm, adjust = "holm")
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (", best_link, " link):\n", sep = ""); print(summary(cmp))

# Also show odds ratios if the chosen link is logit
if (best_link == "logit") {
  sc <- summary(cmp)
  OR_tab <- transform(sc,
    OR  = exp(estimate),
    LCL = exp(estimate - 1.96*SE),
    UCL = exp(estimate + 1.96*SE)
  )[ , c("contrast","OR","LCL","UCL","p.value")]
  cat("\nPairwise odds ratios (logit link):\n"); print(OR_tab, row.names = FALSE)
}

```



2. DS Dyspnea LGME (RI)
```{R}
## ============================
## RI-only GLMM: select time effect → check assumptions → summarize
##   Outcome: Dyspnea  (duststorm)
## ============================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(emmeans)      # for phase contrasts if factor time wins
  library(performance)  # for check_glmm_assumptions()
})

## --- Prep ---
stopifnot(all(c("Dyspnea","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long_ds)))
dat_long_ds$Dyspnea <- as.integer(dat_long_ds$Dyspnea)

# Phase as categorical T1/T2/T3 (no polynomial L/Q), T1 baseline
dat_long_ds$phase <- factor(dat_long_ds$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))  # treatment contrasts

# Be tolerant to alternate column names
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# Numeric encodings for time (for linear/quadratic candidates)
dat_long_ds$phase_num   <- as.numeric(factor(dat_long_ds$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"))) - 1  # 0,1,2
dat_long_ds$phase_num_c <- scale(dat_long_ds$phase_num, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)

ctrl_RI <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))

## --- Fit RI models with different time effects ---

# 1) Factor (response profile: T2/T3 vs T1)
form_RI_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Dyspnea ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_factor <- glmer(form_RI_factor, family = binomial, data = dat_long_ds,
                       nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# 2) Linear time (0→1→2)
form_RI_linear <- as.formula(
  paste0("Dyspnea ~ phase_num + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_linear <- glmer(form_RI_linear, family = binomial, data = dat_long_ds,
                       nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# 3) Quadratic time (centered linear + square)
form_RI_quad <- as.formula(
  paste0("Dyspnea ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_quad <- glmer(form_RI_quad, family = binomial, data = dat_long_ds,
                     nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

## --- Select winner by AIC ---
aic_tab <- data.frame(
  TimeSpec = c("factor","linear","quadratic"),
  AIC      = c(AIC(fit_RI_factor), AIC(fit_RI_linear), AIC(fit_RI_quad))
)
aic_tab <- aic_tab[order(aic_tab$AIC), ]
print(aic_tab)

# If factor is the lowest OR tied for the lowest AIC, choose factor model.
lowest_AIC <- min(aic_tab$AIC)
if (abs(AIC(fit_RI_factor) - lowest_AIC) < 1e-12) {
  best_timespec <- "factor"
} else {
  best_timespec <- aic_tab$TimeSpec[1]
}

best_glmm_RI <- switch(best_timespec,
  factor    = fit_RI_factor,
  linear    = fit_RI_linear,
  quadratic = fit_RI_quad
)

cat("\n>> RI winner by AIC:", best_timespec, " (AIC =", AIC(best_glmm_RI), ")\n")

## --- Assumption checks on the SELECTED model ---
assess_RI <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  best_glmm_RI,
  data = dat_long_ds,
  do_plots = TRUE,
  do_sensitivity = TRUE
)

cat("\nAssumption check — overall OK? ", assess_RI$overall_ok, "\n")
cat("Sensitivity agreement (GLM-CRSE, GEE):\n")
print(assess_RI$sensitivity$agreement)

## --- Final summary of the SELECTED model ---
cat("\n=== Summary of the selected RI model (Dyspnea) ===\n")
print(summary(best_glmm_RI))

## --- If FACTOR time won, show T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2 contrasts ---
if (best_timespec == "factor") {
  cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (log-odds), Holm-adjusted:\n")
  emm_fac <- emmeans(best_glmm_RI, ~ phase)
  print(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"))

  cat("\nSame contrasts as odds ratios (95% CI):\n")
  print(summary(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"), type = "response", infer = c(TRUE, TRUE)))
}

## (Optional) restore previous contrast settings
options(op_old)

```



2. DS Dyspnea GEE
```{r}
# ===========================
# GEE selection + assumptions (Dyspnea outcome) - T1/T2/T3 coding
# ===========================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(geepack); library(emmeans) })

# ---- 0) Clean & sort --------------------------------------------
# allow for grouped or raw versions of family size & income
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

vars <- c("Dyspnea","phase","Age_Group","Gender", fam_sz, inc,
          "HH_Area","HTN_prior","Asthma_prior","Thyroid_prior","ID")

d <- na.omit(dat_long_ds[, vars])
d <- droplevels(d)

# Robust 0/1 coercion for the binary outcome
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Dyspnea must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (any(is.na(out))) {
      bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
      stop("Unrecognized Dyspnea levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
    }
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Dyspnea type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d$Dyspnea <- to01(d$Dyspnea)

# Use treatment contrasts (T1 reference)
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)

# Sort so AR(1) can infer spacing by row order (if chosen)
d <- d[order(d$ID, d$phase), ]

# Common formula (same covariates as your GLMM)
form <- as.formula(sprintf(
  "Dyspnea ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + %s + %s + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior",
  fam_sz, inc
))

# ---- 1) Fit grid: working correlation × link ---------------------
cor_opts <- c("independence","exchangeable","ar1","unstructured")
families <- list(
  logit   = stats::binomial(link = "logit"),
  probit  = stats::binomial(link = "probit"),
  cloglog = stats::binomial(link = "cloglog")
)

fits <- list(); rows <- list()
for (cc in cor_opts) {
  for (lname in names(families)) {
    fam <- families[[lname]]
    key <- paste(cc, lname, sep = "_")
    fit <- geeglm(form, id = ID, family = fam, corstr = cc, data = d)
    qic <- geepack::QIC(fit)
    fits[[key]] <- fit
    rows[[key]] <- data.frame(Correlation = cc, Link = lname,
                              QIC = unname(qic[["QIC"]]),
                              QICu = if (!is.null(qic[["QICu"]])) unname(qic[["QICu"]]) else NA_real_)
  }
}
sel_tab <- do.call(rbind, rows)
row.names(sel_tab) <- NULL
sel_tab <- sel_tab[order(sel_tab$QIC), ]
cat("\nModel selection grid (lower QIC is better):\n"); print(sel_tab)

best_idx  <- which.min(sel_tab$QIC)
best_cor  <- sel_tab$Correlation[best_idx]
best_link <- sel_tab$Link[best_idx]
fit_best  <- fits[[paste(best_cor, best_link, sep = "_")]]

cat("\nBest: correlation =", best_cor, ", link =", best_link,
    " (QIC =", round(sel_tab$QIC[best_idx], 3),
    if (!is.na(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx])) paste0(", QICu = ", round(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx], 3)) else "",
    ")\n")

# Save the selected model and show a summary
best_gee_model <- fit_best
summary(best_gee_model)

# ---- 2) Slide-style table (logit only) ---------------------------
if (!is.null(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])) {
  qic_log <- c(
    Unstructured              = geepack::QIC(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `Constant (Exchangeable)` = geepack::QIC(fits[["exchangeable_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `AR(1)`                   = geepack::QIC(fits[["ar1_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    Independence              = geepack::QIC(fits[["independence_logit"]])[["QIC"]]
  )
  pres_tab <- data.frame(Correlation = names(qic_log),
                         `QIC (logit)` = round(unname(qic_log), 1),
                         check.names = FALSE)
  cat("\nWorking correlation comparison (logit only):\n"); print(pres_tab)
}

# ---- 3) Diagnostics ----------------------------------------------
# 3a) Clusters & size
n_clusters <- length(unique(d$ID))
cat("\n# Clusters:", n_clusters, "\n")
cat("Cluster-size distribution:\n"); print(table(table(d$ID)))

# 3b) Within-ID variation for 'phase'
wcv <- tapply(d$phase, d$ID, function(x) length(unique(x)))
cat("Proportion of clusters with >1 phase level:", round(mean(wcv > 1), 3), "\n")

# 3c) Sparse cells / separation check for phase
tab_phase <- xtabs(~ Dyspnea + phase, data = d)
cat("\nContingency of Dyspnea by phase:\n"); print(tab_phase)

# 3d) Overdispersion (binomial quasi-likelihood)
phi <- sum(residuals(best_gee_model, type = "pearson")^2) / (nrow(d) - length(coef(best_gee_model)))
cat("\nPearson scale (phi):", round(phi, 3), " ( >1 suggests overdispersion )\n")

# 3e) Estimated working correlation
if (!is.null(best_gee_model$geese$alpha)) {
  cat("Estimated working correlation (alpha):", round(best_gee_model$geese$alpha, 3), "\n")
}

# 3f) Influence: leave-one-ID-out on first 'phase' term (T2 vs T1 coefficient)
phase_terms <- grep("^phase", names(coef(best_gee_model)), value = TRUE)
if (length(phase_terms) > 0) {
  target   <- phase_terms[1]
  base_est <- coef(best_gee_model)[target]
  ids <- unique(d$ID)
  set.seed(1)
  probe_ids <- if (length(ids) > 80) sample(ids, 80) else ids

  loo_delta <- sapply(probe_ids, function(i){
    dd <- d[d$ID != i, ]
    dd <- dd[order(dd$ID, dd$phase), ]
    fam_best <- families[[best_link]]
    fit_i <- geeglm(form, id = ID, family = fam_best, corstr = best_cor, data = dd)
    cf <- coef(fit_i); if (!target %in% names(cf)) return(NA_real_)
    cf[target] - base_est
  })
  infl_tab <- data.frame(ID = probe_ids, dBeta = loo_delta)
  infl_tab <- infl_tab[order(abs(infl_tab$dBeta), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  cat("\nTop 10 influential clusters for", target, "(|Δβ|):\n")
  print(head(infl_tab, 10), row.names = FALSE)
}

# ---- 4) Effects table with robust CIs ----------------------------
est <- coef(best_gee_model)
se  <- sqrt(diag(best_gee_model$geese$vbeta))     # robust (sandwich)
z   <- est / se
p   <- 2*pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE)

if (best_link == "logit") {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    OR  = round(exp(est), 3),
    LCL = round(exp(est - 1.96*se), 3),
    UCL = round(exp(est + 1.96*se), 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
} else {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    Estimate = round(est, 3),
    LCL = round(est - 1.96*se, 3),
    UCL = round(est + 1.96*se, 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    Link = best_link,
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
}
cat("\nPopulation-averaged effects for best GEE model (Dyspnea):\n"); print(OUT)

# ---- 5) Pairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) -----------
emm  <- emmeans(best_gee_model, ~ phase, vcov. = vcov(best_gee_model))
cmp  <- pairs(emm, adjust = "holm")
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (", best_link, " link):\n", sep = ""); print(summary(cmp))

# Also show odds ratios if the chosen link is logit
if (best_link == "logit") {
  sc <- summary(cmp)
  OR_tab <- transform(sc,
    OR  = exp(estimate),
    LCL = exp(estimate - 1.96*SE),
    UCL = exp(estimate + 1.96*SE)
  )[ , c("contrast","OR","LCL","UCL","p.value")]
  cat("\nPairwise odds ratios (logit link):\n"); print(OR_tab, row.names = FALSE)
}

```



2. DS Fatigue LGME (RI)
```{r}
## ============================
## RI-only GLMM: select time effect → check assumptions → summarize
##   Outcome: Fatigue  (duststorm)
## ============================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(emmeans)      # for phase contrasts if factor time wins
  library(performance)  # for check_glmm_assumptions()
})

## --- Prep ---
stopifnot(all(c("Fatigue","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long_ds)))
dat_long_ds$Fatigue <- as.integer(dat_long_ds$Fatigue)

# Phase as categorical T1/T2/T3 (no polynomial L/Q), T1 baseline
dat_long_ds$phase <- factor(dat_long_ds$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))  # treatment contrasts

# Be tolerant to alternate column names
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# Numeric encodings for time (for linear/quadratic candidates)
dat_long_ds$phase_num   <- as.numeric(factor(dat_long_ds$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"))) - 1  # 0,1,2
dat_long_ds$phase_num_c <- scale(dat_long_ds$phase_num, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)

ctrl_RI <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))

## --- Fit RI models with different time effects ---

# 1) Factor (response profile: T2/T3 vs T1)
form_RI_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Fatigue ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_factor <- glmer(form_RI_factor, family = binomial, data = dat_long_ds,
                       nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# 2) Linear time (0→1→2)
form_RI_linear <- as.formula(
  paste0("Fatigue ~ phase_num + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_linear <- glmer(form_RI_linear, family = binomial, data = dat_long_ds,
                       nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# 3) Quadratic time (centered linear + square)
form_RI_quad <- as.formula(
  paste0("Fatigue ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_quad <- glmer(form_RI_quad, family = binomial, data = dat_long_ds,
                     nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

## --- Select winner by AIC ---
aic_tab <- data.frame(
  TimeSpec = c("factor","linear","quadratic"),
  AIC      = c(AIC(fit_RI_factor), AIC(fit_RI_linear), AIC(fit_RI_quad))
)
aic_tab <- aic_tab[order(aic_tab$AIC), ]
print(aic_tab)

# If factor is the lowest OR tied for the lowest AIC, choose factor model.
lowest_AIC <- min(aic_tab$AIC)
if (abs(AIC(fit_RI_factor) - lowest_AIC) < 1e-12) {
  best_timespec <- "factor"
} else {
  best_timespec <- aic_tab$TimeSpec[1]
}

best_glmm_RI <- switch(best_timespec,
  factor    = fit_RI_factor,
  linear    = fit_RI_linear,
  quadratic = fit_RI_quad
)

cat("\n>> RI winner by AIC:", best_timespec, " (AIC =", AIC(best_glmm_RI), ")\n")

## --- Assumption checks on the SELECTED model ---
assess_RI <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  best_glmm_RI,
  data = dat_long_ds,
  do_plots = TRUE,
  do_sensitivity = TRUE
)

cat("\nAssumption check — overall OK? ", assess_RI$overall_ok, "\n")
cat("Sensitivity agreement (GLM-CRSE, GEE):\n")
print(assess_RI$sensitivity$agreement)

## --- Final summary of the SELECTED model ---
cat("\n=== Summary of the selected RI model (Fatigue) ===\n")
print(summary(best_glmm_RI))

## --- If FACTOR time won, show T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2 contrasts ---
if (best_timespec == "factor") {
  cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (log-odds), Holm-adjusted:\n")
  emm_fac <- emmeans(best_glmm_RI, ~ phase)
  print(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"))

  cat("\nSame contrasts as odds ratios (95% CI):\n")
  print(summary(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"), type = "response", infer = c(TRUE, TRUE)))
}

## (Optional) restore previous contrast settings
options(op_old)

```


2. DS Fatigue GEE
```{r}
# ===========================
# GEE selection + assumptions (Fatigue outcome) - T1/T2/T3 coding
# ===========================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(geepack); library(emmeans) })

# ---- 0) Clean & sort --------------------------------------------
# allow for grouped or raw versions of family size & income
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

vars <- c("Fatigue","phase","Age_Group","Gender", fam_sz, inc,
          "HH_Area","HTN_prior","Asthma_prior","Thyroid_prior","CVDs_prior","ID")

d <- na.omit(dat_long_ds[, vars])
d <- droplevels(d)

# Robust 0/1 coercion for the binary outcome
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Fatigue must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (any(is.na(out))) {
      bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
      stop("Unrecognized Fatigue levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
    }
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Fatigue type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d$Fatigue <- to01(d$Fatigue)

# Use treatment contrasts (T1 reference)
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)

# Sort so AR(1) can infer spacing by row order (if chosen)
d <- d[order(d$ID, d$phase), ]

# Common formula (same covariates as your GLMM)
form <- as.formula(sprintf(
  "Fatigue ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + %s + %s + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior",
  fam_sz, inc
))

# ---- 1) Fit grid: working correlation × link ---------------------
cor_opts <- c("independence","exchangeable","ar1","unstructured")
families <- list(
  logit   = stats::binomial(link = "logit"),
  probit  = stats::binomial(link = "probit"),
  cloglog = stats::binomial(link = "cloglog")
)

fits <- list(); rows <- list()
for (cc in cor_opts) {
  for (lname in names(families)) {
    fam <- families[[lname]]
    key <- paste(cc, lname, sep = "_")
    fit <- geeglm(form, id = ID, family = fam, corstr = cc, data = d)
    qic <- geepack::QIC(fit)
    fits[[key]] <- fit
    rows[[key]] <- data.frame(Correlation = cc, Link = lname,
                              QIC = unname(qic[["QIC"]]),
                              QICu = if (!is.null(qic[["QICu"]])) unname(qic[["QICu"]]) else NA_real_)
  }
}
sel_tab <- do.call(rbind, rows)
row.names(sel_tab) <- NULL
sel_tab <- sel_tab[order(sel_tab$QIC), ]
cat("\nModel selection grid (lower QIC is better):\n"); print(sel_tab)

best_idx  <- which.min(sel_tab$QIC)
best_cor  <- sel_tab$Correlation[best_idx]
best_link <- sel_tab$Link[best_idx]
fit_best  <- fits[[paste(best_cor, best_link, sep = "_")]]

cat("\nBest: correlation =", best_cor, ", link =", best_link,
    " (QIC =", round(sel_tab$QIC[best_idx], 3),
    if (!is.na(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx])) paste0(", QICu = ", round(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx], 3)) else "",
    ")\n")

# Save the selected model and show a summary
best_gee_model <- fit_best
summary(best_gee_model)

# ---- 2) Slide-style table (logit only) ---------------------------
if (!is.null(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])) {
  qic_log <- c(
    Unstructured              = geepack::QIC(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `Constant (Exchangeable)` = geepack::QIC(fits[["exchangeable_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `AR(1)`                   = geepack::QIC(fits[["ar1_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    Independence              = geepack::QIC(fits[["independence_logit"]])[["QIC"]]
  )
  pres_tab <- data.frame(Correlation = names(qic_log),
                         `QIC (logit)` = round(unname(qic_log), 1),
                         check.names = FALSE)
  cat("\nWorking correlation comparison (logit only):\n"); print(pres_tab)
}

# ---- 3) Diagnostics ----------------------------------------------
# 3a) Clusters & size
n_clusters <- length(unique(d$ID))
cat("\n# Clusters:", n_clusters, "\n")
cat("Cluster-size distribution:\n"); print(table(table(d$ID)))

# 3b) Within-ID variation for 'phase'
wcv <- tapply(d$phase, d$ID, function(x) length(unique(x)))
cat("Proportion of clusters with >1 phase level:", round(mean(wcv > 1), 3), "\n")

# 3c) Sparse cells / separation check for phase
tab_phase <- xtabs(~ Fatigue + phase, data = d)
cat("\nContingency of Fatigue by phase:\n"); print(tab_phase)

# 3d) Overdispersion (binomial quasi-likelihood)
phi <- sum(residuals(best_gee_model, type = "pearson")^2) / (nrow(d) - length(coef(best_gee_model)))
cat("\nPearson scale (phi):", round(phi, 3), " ( >1 suggests overdispersion )\n")

# 3e) Estimated working correlation
if (!is.null(best_gee_model$geese$alpha)) {
  cat("Estimated working correlation (alpha):", round(best_gee_model$geese$alpha, 3), "\n")
}

# 3f) Influence: leave-one-ID-out on first 'phase' term (T2 vs T1 coefficient)
phase_terms <- grep("^phase", names(coef(best_gee_model)), value = TRUE)
if (length(phase_terms) > 0) {
  target   <- phase_terms[1]
  base_est <- coef(best_gee_model)[target]
  ids <- unique(d$ID)
  set.seed(1)
  probe_ids <- if (length(ids) > 80) sample(ids, 80) else ids

  loo_delta <- sapply(probe_ids, function(i){
    dd <- d[d$ID != i, ]
    dd <- dd[order(dd$ID, dd$phase), ]
    fam_best <- families[[best_link]]
    fit_i <- geeglm(form, id = ID, family = fam_best, corstr = best_cor, data = dd)
    cf <- coef(fit_i); if (!target %in% names(cf)) return(NA_real_)
    cf[target] - base_est
  })
  infl_tab <- data.frame(ID = probe_ids, dBeta = loo_delta)
  infl_tab <- infl_tab[order(abs(infl_tab$dBeta), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  cat("\nTop 10 influential clusters for", target, "(|Δβ|):\n")
  print(head(infl_tab, 10), row.names = FALSE)
}

# ---- 4) Effects table with robust CIs ----------------------------
est <- coef(best_gee_model)
se  <- sqrt(diag(best_gee_model$geese$vbeta))     # robust (sandwich)
z   <- est / se
p   <- 2*pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE)

if (best_link == "logit") {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    OR  = round(exp(est), 3),
    LCL = round(exp(est - 1.96*se), 3),
    UCL = round(exp(est + 1.96*se), 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
} else {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    Estimate = round(est, 3),
    LCL = round(est - 1.96*se, 3),
    UCL = round(est + 1.96*se, 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    Link = best_link,
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
}
cat("\nPopulation-averaged effects for best GEE model (Fatigue):\n"); print(OUT)

# ---- 5) Pairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) -----------
emm  <- emmeans(best_gee_model, ~ phase, vcov. = vcov(best_gee_model))
cmp  <- pairs(emm, adjust = "holm")
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (", best_link, " link):\n", sep = ""); print(summary(cmp))

# Also show odds ratios if the chosen link is logit
if (best_link == "logit") {
  sc <- summary(cmp)
  OR_tab <- transform(sc,
    OR  = exp(estimate),
    LCL = exp(estimate - 1.96*SE),
    UCL = exp(estimate + 1.96*SE)
  )[ , c("contrast","OR","LCL","UCL","p.value")]
  cat("\nPairwise odds ratios (logit link):\n"); print(OR_tab, row.names = FALSE)
}

```





3. DS Allergy LGME
```{r}
## ============================
## RI-only GLMM: select time effect → check assumptions → summarize
##   Outcome: Allergy  (duststorm)
## ============================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(emmeans)      # for phase contrasts if factor time wins
  library(performance)  # for check_glmm_assumptions()
})

## --- Prep ---
stopifnot(all(c("Allergy","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long_ds)))
dat_long_ds$Allergy <- as.integer(dat_long_ds$Allergy)

# Phase as categorical T1/T2/T3 (no polynomial L/Q), T1 baseline
dat_long_ds$phase <- factor(dat_long_ds$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))  # treatment contrasts

# Be tolerant to alternate column names
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# Numeric encodings for time (for linear/quadratic candidates)
dat_long_ds$phase_num   <- as.numeric(factor(dat_long_ds$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"))) - 1  # 0,1,2
dat_long_ds$phase_num_c <- scale(dat_long_ds$phase_num, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)

ctrl_RI <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))

## --- Fit RI models with different time effects ---

# 1) Factor (response profile: T2/T3 vs T1)
form_RI_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Allergy ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_factor <- glmer(form_RI_factor, family = binomial, data = dat_long_ds,
                       nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# 2) Linear time (0→1→2)
form_RI_linear <- as.formula(
  paste0("Allergy ~ phase_num + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_linear <- glmer(form_RI_linear, family = binomial, data = dat_long_ds,
                       nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

# 3) Quadratic time (centered linear + square)
form_RI_quad <- as.formula(
  paste0("Allergy ~ phase_num_c + I(phase_num_c^2) + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_quad <- glmer(form_RI_quad, family = binomial, data = dat_long_ds,
                     nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

## --- Select winner by AIC ---
aic_tab <- data.frame(
  TimeSpec = c("factor","linear","quadratic"),
  AIC      = c(AIC(fit_RI_factor), AIC(fit_RI_linear), AIC(fit_RI_quad))
)
aic_tab <- aic_tab[order(aic_tab$AIC), ]
print(aic_tab)

# If factor is the lowest OR tied for the lowest AIC, choose factor model.
lowest_AIC <- min(aic_tab$AIC)
if (abs(AIC(fit_RI_factor) - lowest_AIC) < 1e-12) {
  best_timespec <- "factor"
} else {
  best_timespec <- aic_tab$TimeSpec[1]
}

best_glmm_RI <- switch(best_timespec,
  factor    = fit_RI_factor,
  linear    = fit_RI_linear,
  quadratic = fit_RI_quad
)

cat("\n>> RI winner by AIC:", best_timespec, " (AIC =", AIC(best_glmm_RI), ")\n")

## --- Assumption checks on the SELECTED model ---
assess_RI <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  best_glmm_RI,
  data = dat_long_ds,
  do_plots = TRUE,
  do_sensitivity = TRUE
)

cat("\nAssumption check — overall OK? ", assess_RI$overall_ok, "\n")
cat("Sensitivity agreement (GLM-CRSE, GEE):\n")
print(assess_RI$sensitivity$agreement)

## --- Final summary of the SELECTED model ---
cat("\n=== Summary of the selected RI model (Allergy) ===\n")
print(summary(best_glmm_RI))

## --- If FACTOR time won, show T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2 contrasts ---
if (best_timespec == "factor") {
  cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (log-odds), Holm-adjusted:\n")
  emm_fac <- emmeans(best_glmm_RI, ~ phase)
  print(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"))

  cat("\nSame contrasts as odds ratios (95% CI):\n")
  print(summary(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"), type = "response", infer = c(TRUE, TRUE)))
}

## (Optional) restore previous contrast settings
options(op_old)

```

```{r}
## ============================
## RI-only GLMM (forced factor time effect)
##   Outcome: Allergy  (duststorm)
## ============================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(emmeans)      # for pairwise phase contrasts
  library(performance)  # for check_glmm_assumptions()
})

## --- Prep ---
stopifnot(all(c("Allergy","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long_ds)))

# Robust 0/1 coercion
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) { ux <- sort(unique(x)); if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Allergy must be 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", ")) }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (anyNA(out)) stop("Unrecognized Allergy levels for 0/1 mapping.")
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Allergy type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d <- dat_long_ds
d$Allergy <- to01(d$Allergy)

# Phase as categorical (force factor), T1 as baseline
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))

# Handle alternate column names
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(d)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(d)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# GLMM control
ctrl_RI <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))

## --- Fit RI GLMM with factor time effect only ---
form_RI_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Allergy ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)

fit_RI_factor <- glmer(form_RI_factor, family = binomial, data = d,
                       nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

cat("\n>> RI model (factor time effect forced) fitted. AIC =", AIC(fit_RI_factor), "\n")

## --- Assumption checks ---
assess_RI <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  fit_RI_factor,
  data = d,
  do_plots = TRUE,
  do_sensitivity = TRUE
)
cat("\nAssumption check — overall OK? ", assess_RI$overall_ok, "\n")
cat("Sensitivity agreement (GLM-CRSE, GEE):\n")
print(assess_RI$sensitivity$agreement)

## --- Final summary ---
cat("\n=== Summary of the RI model (Allergy, duststorm; factor time) ===\n")
print(summary(fit_RI_factor))

## --- Pairwise phase contrasts ---
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (log-odds), Holm-adjusted:\n")
emm_fac <- emmeans(fit_RI_factor, ~ phase)
print(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"))

cat("\nSame contrasts as odds ratios (95% CI):\n")
print(summary(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"),
              type = "response", infer = c(TRUE, TRUE)))

## --- Restore contrast settings ---
options(op_old)


```








3. DS Allergy GEE
```{r}
# ===========================
# GEE selection + assumptions (Allergy outcome) - T1/T2/T3 coding
# ===========================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(geepack); library(emmeans) })

# ---- 0) Clean & sort --------------------------------------------
# allow for grouped or raw versions of family size & income
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

vars <- c("Allergy","phase","Age_Group","Gender", fam_sz, inc,
          "HH_Area","HTN_prior","Asthma_prior","Thyroid_prior","ID")

d <- na.omit(dat_long_ds[, vars])
d <- droplevels(d)

# Robust 0/1 coercion for the binary outcome
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Allergy must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (any(is.na(out))) {
      bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
      stop("Unrecognized Allergy levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
    }
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Allergy type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d$Allergy <- to01(d$Allergy)

# Use treatment contrasts (T1 reference)
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)

# Sort so AR(1) can infer spacing by row order (if chosen)
d <- d[order(d$ID, d$phase), ]

# Common formula (same covariates as your GLMM)
form <- as.formula(sprintf(
  "Allergy ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + %s + %s + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior",
  fam_sz, inc
))

# ---- 1) Fit grid: working correlation × link ---------------------
cor_opts <- c("independence","exchangeable","ar1","unstructured")
families <- list(
  logit   = stats::binomial(link = "logit"),
  probit  = stats::binomial(link = "probit"),
  cloglog = stats::binomial(link = "cloglog")
)

fits <- list(); rows <- list()
for (cc in cor_opts) {
  for (lname in names(families)) {
    fam <- families[[lname]]
    key <- paste(cc, lname, sep = "_")
    fit <- geeglm(form, id = ID, family = fam, corstr = cc, data = d)
    qic <- geepack::QIC(fit)
    fits[[key]] <- fit
    rows[[key]] <- data.frame(Correlation = cc, Link = lname,
                              QIC = unname(qic[["QIC"]]),
                              QICu = if (!is.null(qic[["QICu"]])) unname(qic[["QICu"]]) else NA_real_)
  }
}
sel_tab <- do.call(rbind, rows)
row.names(sel_tab) <- NULL
sel_tab <- sel_tab[order(sel_tab$QIC), ]
cat("\nModel selection grid (lower QIC is better):\n"); print(sel_tab)

best_idx  <- which.min(sel_tab$QIC)
best_cor  <- sel_tab$Correlation[best_idx]
best_link <- sel_tab$Link[best_idx]
fit_best  <- fits[[paste(best_cor, best_link, sep = "_")]]

cat("\nBest: correlation =", best_cor, ", link =", best_link,
    " (QIC =", round(sel_tab$QIC[best_idx], 3),
    if (!is.na(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx])) paste0(", QICu = ", round(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx], 3)) else "",
    ")\n")

# Save the selected model and show a summary
best_gee_model <- fit_best
summary(best_gee_model)

# ---- 2) Slide-style table (logit only) ---------------------------
if (!is.null(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])) {
  qic_log <- c(
    Unstructured              = geepack::QIC(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `Constant (Exchangeable)` = geepack::QIC(fits[["exchangeable_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `AR(1)`                   = geepack::QIC(fits[["ar1_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    Independence              = geepack::QIC(fits[["independence_logit"]])[["QIC"]]
  )
  pres_tab <- data.frame(Correlation = names(qic_log),
                         `QIC (logit)` = round(unname(qic_log), 1),
                         check.names = FALSE)
  cat("\nWorking correlation comparison (logit only):\n"); print(pres_tab)
}

# ---- 3) Diagnostics ----------------------------------------------
# 3a) Clusters & size
n_clusters <- length(unique(d$ID))
cat("\n# Clusters:", n_clusters, "\n")
cat("Cluster-size distribution:\n"); print(table(table(d$ID)))

# 3b) Within-ID variation for 'phase'
wcv <- tapply(d$phase, d$ID, function(x) length(unique(x)))
cat("Proportion of clusters with >1 phase level:", round(mean(wcv > 1), 3), "\n")

# 3c) Sparse cells / separation check for phase
tab_phase <- xtabs(~ Allergy + phase, data = d)
cat("\nContingency of Allergy by phase:\n"); print(tab_phase)

# 3d) Overdispersion (binomial quasi-likelihood)
phi <- sum(residuals(best_gee_model, type = "pearson")^2) / (nrow(d) - length(coef(best_gee_model)))
cat("\nPearson scale (phi):", round(phi, 3), " ( >1 suggests overdispersion )\n")

# 3e) Estimated working correlation
if (!is.null(best_gee_model$geese$alpha)) {
  cat("Estimated working correlation (alpha):", round(best_gee_model$geese$alpha, 3), "\n")
}

# 3f) Influence: leave-one-ID-out on first 'phase' term (T2 vs T1 coefficient)
phase_terms <- grep("^phase", names(coef(best_gee_model)), value = TRUE)
if (length(phase_terms) > 0) {
  target   <- phase_terms[1]
  base_est <- coef(best_gee_model)[target]
  ids <- unique(d$ID)
  set.seed(1)
  probe_ids <- if (length(ids) > 80) sample(ids, 80) else ids

  loo_delta <- sapply(probe_ids, function(i){
    dd <- d[d$ID != i, ]
    dd <- dd[order(dd$ID, dd$phase), ]
    fam_best <- families[[best_link]]
    fit_i <- geeglm(form, id = ID, family = fam_best, corstr = best_cor, data = dd)
    cf <- coef(fit_i); if (!target %in% names(cf)) return(NA_real_)
    cf[target] - base_est
  })
  infl_tab <- data.frame(ID = probe_ids, dBeta = loo_delta)
  infl_tab <- infl_tab[order(abs(infl_tab$dBeta), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  cat("\nTop 10 influential clusters for", target, "(|Δβ|):\n")
  print(head(infl_tab, 10), row.names = FALSE)
}

# ---- 4) Effects table with robust CIs ----------------------------
est <- coef(best_gee_model)
se  <- sqrt(diag(best_gee_model$geese$vbeta))     # robust (sandwich)
z   <- est / se
p   <- 2*pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE)

if (best_link == "logit") {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    OR  = round(exp(est), 3),
    LCL = round(exp(est - 1.96*se), 3),
    UCL = round(exp(est + 1.96*se), 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
} else {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    Estimate = round(est, 3),
    LCL = round(est - 1.96*se, 3),
    UCL = round(est + 1.96*se, 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    Link = best_link,
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
}
cat("\nPopulation-averaged effects for best GEE model (Allergy):\n"); print(OUT)

# ---- 5) Pairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) -----------
emm  <- emmeans(best_gee_model, ~ phase, vcov. = vcov(best_gee_model))
cmp  <- pairs(emm, adjust = "holm")
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (", best_link, " link):\n", sep = ""); print(summary(cmp))

# Also show odds ratios if the chosen link is logit
if (best_link == "logit") {
  sc <- summary(cmp)
  OR_tab <- transform(sc,
    OR  = exp(estimate),
    LCL = exp(estimate - 1.96*SE),
    UCL = exp(estimate + 1.96*SE)
  )[ , c("contrast","OR","LCL","UCL","p.value")]
  cat("\nPairwise odds ratios (logit link):\n"); print(OR_tab, row.names = FALSE)
}

```



4. DS Psychological LGME
```{r}
## ===========================================
## RI-only GLMM (binomial, factor time forced)
## Outcome: Psychological (duststorm)
## ===========================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(emmeans)      # pairwise phase contrasts
  library(performance)  # check_glmm_assumptions()
})

## ---------- Prep ----------
stopifnot(all(c("Psychological","phase","ID") %in% names(dat_long_ds)))

# Robust 0/1 coercion
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Psychological must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (anyNA(out)) {
      bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
      stop("Unrecognized Psychological levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
    }
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Psychological type: ", class(x)[1])
}
dat_long_ds$Psychological <- to01(dat_long_ds$Psychological)

# Phase as categorical (T1 baseline)
dat_long_ds$phase <- factor(dat_long_ds$phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = FALSE)
op_old <- options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment","contr.treatment"))

# Handle alternate column names
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(dat_long_ds)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# GLMM control
ctrl_RI <- glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))

## ---------- Fit model (factor time only) ----------
form_RI_factor <- as.formula(
  paste0("Psychological ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + ", fam_sz, " + ", inc,
         " + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior + (1 | ID)")
)
fit_RI_factor <- glmer(form_RI_factor, family = binomial,
                       data = dat_long_ds, nAGQ = 20, control = ctrl_RI)

cat("\n>> RI model (factor time effect forced) fitted. AIC =", AIC(fit_RI_factor), "\n")

## ---------- Assumption checks ----------
assess_RI <- check_glmm_assumptions(
  fit_RI_factor,
  data = dat_long_ds,
  do_plots = TRUE,
  do_sensitivity = TRUE
)
cat("\nAssumption check — overall OK? ", assess_RI$overall_ok, "\n")

## ---------- Final summary ----------
cat("\n=== Summary of the RI model (Psychological, duststorm; factor time) ===\n")
print(summary(fit_RI_factor))

## ---------- Pairwise phase contrasts ----------
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (log-odds), Holm-adjusted:\n")
emm_fac <- emmeans(fit_RI_factor, ~ phase)
print(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"))

cat("\nSame contrasts as odds ratios (95% CI):\n")
print(summary(pairs(emm_fac, adjust = "holm"),
              type = "response", infer = c(TRUE, TRUE)))

## ---------- Restore contrasts ----------
options(op_old)


```


4. DS Psychological GEE
```{r}
# ===========================
# GEE selection + assumptions (Psychological outcome; duststorm data) - T1/T2/T3 coding
# ===========================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(geepack); library(emmeans) })

# ---- 0) Clean & sort --------------------------------------------
base_df <- dat_long_ds  # <<< use duststorm long data

# allow for grouped or raw versions of family size & income
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(base_df)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(base_df)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

vars <- c("Psychological","phase","Age_Group","Gender", fam_sz, inc,
          "HH_Area","HTN_prior","Asthma_prior","Thyroid_prior","CVDs_prior","ID")

d <- na.omit(base_df[, vars])
d <- droplevels(d)
stopifnot(!anyNA(d$ID))

# Robust 0/1 coercion for the binary outcome
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric Psychological must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
    zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
    out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
    if (any(is.na(out))) {
      bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
      stop("Unrecognized Psychological levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
    }
    return(out)
  }
  stop("Unsupported Psychological type: ", class(x)[1])
}
d$Psychological <- to01(d$Psychological)

# Use treatment contrasts with T1 as reference (UNORDERED)
want_lvls <- c("T1","T2","T3")
if (!all(want_lvls %in% levels(d$phase))) {
  stop("phase must have levels T1, T2, T3; found: ", paste(levels(d$phase), collapse=", "))
}
d$phase <- factor(d$phase, levels = want_lvls, ordered = FALSE)
contrasts(d$phase) <- stats::contr.treatment(n = length(levels(d$phase)), base = 1)

# AR(1) wave index + sort
d$wave <- as.integer(d$phase)
d <- d[order(d$ID, d$phase), ]

# Common formula
form <- as.formula(sprintf(
  "Psychological ~ phase + Age_Group + Gender + %s + %s + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior",
  fam_sz, inc
))

# ---- 1) Fit grid: working correlation × link ---------------------
cor_opts <- c("independence","exchangeable","ar1","unstructured")
families <- list(
  logit   = stats::binomial(link = "logit"),
  probit  = stats::binomial(link = "probit"),
  cloglog = stats::binomial(link = "cloglog")
)

fits <- list(); rows <- list()
for (cc in cor_opts) {
  for (lname in names(families)) {
    fam <- families[[lname]]
    key <- paste(cc, lname, sep = "_")
    fit <- geeglm(form, id = ID, waves = wave, family = fam, corstr = cc, data = d)
    qic <- geepack::QIC(fit)
    fits[[key]] <- fit
    rows[[key]] <- data.frame(Correlation = cc, Link = lname,
                              QIC = unname(qic[["QIC"]]),
                              QICu = if (!is.null(qic[["QICu"]])) unname(qic[["QICu"]]) else NA_real_)
  }
}
sel_tab <- do.call(rbind, rows); row.names(sel_tab) <- NULL
sel_tab <- sel_tab[order(sel_tab$QIC), ]
cat("\nModel selection grid (lower QIC is better):\n"); print(sel_tab)

best_idx  <- which.min(sel_tab$QIC)
best_cor  <- sel_tab$Correlation[best_idx]
best_link <- sel_tab$Link[best_idx]
best_gee_model <- fits[[paste(best_cor, best_link, sep = "_")]]
cat("\nBest: correlation =", best_cor, ", link =", best_link,
    " (QIC =", round(sel_tab$QIC[best_idx], 3),
    if (!is.na(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx])) paste0(", QICu = ", round(sel_tab$QICu[best_idx], 3)) else "",
    ")\n")
summary(best_gee_model)

# ---- 2) Slide-style table (logit only) ---------------------------
if (!is.null(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])) {
  qic_log <- c(
    Unstructured              = geepack::QIC(fits[["unstructured_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `Constant (Exchangeable)` = geepack::QIC(fits[["exchangeable_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    `AR(1)`                   = geepack::QIC(fits[["ar1_logit"]])[["QIC"]],
    Independence              = geepack::QIC(fits[["independence_logit"]])[["QIC"]]
  )
  pres_tab <- data.frame(Correlation = names(qic_log),
                         `QIC (logit)` = round(unname(qic_log), 1),
                         check.names = FALSE)
  cat("\nWorking correlation comparison (logit only):\n"); print(pres_tab)
}

# ---- 3) Diagnostics ----------------------------------------------
n_clusters <- length(unique(d$ID))
cat("\n# Clusters:", n_clusters, "\n")
cat("Cluster-size distribution:\n"); print(table(table(d$ID)))

wcv <- tapply(d$phase, d$ID, function(x) length(unique(x)))
cat("Proportion of clusters with >1 phase level:", round(mean(wcv > 1), 3), "\n")

tab_phase <- xtabs(~ Psychological + phase, data = d)
cat("\nContingency of Psychological by phase:\n"); print(tab_phase)
if (any(apply(tab_phase, 2, function(col) any(col == 0)))) {
  warning("Zero cell(s) detected for some phase levels (check separation/sparsity).")
}

phi <- sum(residuals(best_gee_model, type = "pearson")^2) / (nrow(d) - length(coef(best_gee_model)))
cat("\nPearson scale (phi):", round(phi, 3), " ( >1 suggests overdispersion )\n")

if (!is.null(best_gee_model$geese$alpha)) {
  cat("Estimated working correlation (alpha):", paste(round(best_gee_model$geese$alpha, 3), collapse = " "), "\n")
}

# ---- 3f) Influence: leave-one-ID-out on first 'phase' term -------
phase_terms <- grep("^phase", names(coef(best_gee_model)), value = TRUE)
if (length(phase_terms) > 0) {
  target   <- phase_terms[1]   # typically "phaseT2" if T1 is reference
  base_est <- coef(best_gee_model)[target]
  ids <- unique(d$ID)
  set.seed(1)
  probe_ids <- if (length(ids) > 80) sample(ids, 80) else ids

  loo_delta <- sapply(probe_ids, function(i){
    dd <- d[d$ID != i, ]
    dd <- dd[order(dd$ID, dd$phase), ]
    fam_best <- families[[best_link]]
    fit_i <- geeglm(form, id = ID, waves = wave, family = fam_best, corstr = best_cor, data = dd)
    cf <- coef(fit_i); if (!target %in% names(cf)) return(NA_real_)
    cf[target] - base_est
  })
  infl_tab <- data.frame(ID = probe_ids, dBeta = loo_delta)
  infl_tab <- infl_tab[order(abs(infl_tab$dBeta), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  cat("\nTop 10 influential clusters for", target, "(|Δβ|):\n")
  print(head(infl_tab, 10), row.names = FALSE)
}

# ---- 4) Effects table with robust CIs ----------------------------
est <- coef(best_gee_model)
se  <- sqrt(diag(best_gee_model$geese$vbeta))     # robust (sandwich)
z   <- est / se
p   <- 2*pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE)

if (best_link == "logit") {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    OR  = round(exp(est), 3),
    LCL = round(exp(est - 1.96*se), 3),
    UCL = round(exp(est + 1.96*se), 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
} else {
  OUT <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(est),
    Estimate = round(est, 3),               # link scale (probit or cloglog)
    LCL = round(est - 1.96*se, 3),
    UCL = round(est + 1.96*se, 3),
    `p(Wald)` = signif(p, 3),
    Link = best_link,
    check.names = FALSE, row.names = NULL
  )
}
cat("\nPopulation-averaged effects for best GEE model (Psychological):\n"); print(OUT)

# ---- 5) Pairwise phase contrasts (T2–T1, T3–T1, T3–T2) -----------
emm  <- emmeans(best_gee_model, ~ phase, vcov. = vcov(best_gee_model))   # robust vcov
cmp  <- pairs(emm, adjust = "holm")
cat("\nPairwise phase contrasts (", best_link, " link):\n", sep = ""); print(summary(cmp))

# Also show odds ratios if the chosen link is logit
if (best_link == "logit") {
  sc <- summary(cmp)
  OR_tab <- transform(sc,
    OR  = exp(estimate),
    LCL = exp(estimate - 1.96*SE),
    UCL = exp(estimate + 1.96*SE)
  )[ , c("contrast","OR","LCL","UCL","p.value")]
  cat("\nPairwise odds ratios (logit link):\n"); print(OR_tab, row.names = FALSE)
}

cat("\nCoefficient names:\n"); print(names(coef(best_gee_model)))

```





Dustom Outcome and Condition Pair Time Test (10% or above only)
```{r}
# ========= Pairwise OR for T2 vs T3 for ANY outcome(s) =========

library(geepack)

# 0/1 coercion
to01 <- function(x){
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    if (all(ux %in% c(0,1))) return(as.integer(x))
    stop("Numeric outcome must be coded 0/1; found: ", paste(ux, collapse=", "))
  }
  z <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  ones  <- c("1","yes","y","true","t","present","pos","positive")
  zeros <- c("0","no","n","false","f","absent","neg","negative")
  out <- ifelse(z %in% ones, 1L, ifelse(z %in% zeros, 0L, NA_integer_))
  if (any(is.na(out))) {
    bad <- sort(unique(z[is.na(out)]))
    stop("Unrecognized levels for 0/1 mapping: ", paste(bad, collapse=", "))
  }
  out
}

# ---------- DATASET ----------
base_df <- dat_long_ds   # <--- CHANGED

# grouped/raw names
fam_sz <- if ("Family_Size_Group" %in% names(base_df)) "Family_Size_Group" else "Family_Size"
inc    <- if ("Monthly_Income_Group" %in% names(base_df)) "Monthly_Income_Group" else "Monthly_Income"

# RHS of model
form_rhs <- sprintf(
  "phase + Age_Group + Gender + %s + %s + HH_Area + HTN_prior + Asthma_prior + Thyroid_prior + CVDs_prior",
  fam_sz, inc
)

# phase coding
want_lvls <- c("T1","T2","T3")
stopifnot("phase" %in% names(base_df))
base_df$phase <- factor(base_df$phase, levels = want_lvls, ordered = FALSE)
base_df$wave  <- as.integer(base_df$phase)

# function: T2 vs T3 OR
gee_pair_T2vsT3 <- function(outcome, corstr = "exchangeable") {
  if (!outcome %in% names(base_df)) {
    stop("Outcome '", outcome, "' not found in base_df.")
  }
  keep <- unique(c(outcome, "phase", "Age_Group", "Gender", fam_sz, inc,
                   "HH_Area", "HTN_prior", "Asthma_prior", "Thyroid_prior",
                   "CVDs_prior", "ID", "wave"))
  dd <- droplevels(na.omit(base_df[, keep, drop = FALSE]))
  stopifnot(!anyNA(dd$ID))

  dd[[outcome]] <- to01(dd[[outcome]])

  form <- as.formula(paste0(outcome, " ~ ", form_rhs))
  fit  <- geeglm(form, id = ID, waves = wave,
                 family = binomial(link = "logit"),
                 corstr = corstr, data = dd)

  b <- coef(fit); V <- fit$geese$vbeta; cn <- names(b)
  b_T2 <- grep("^phase.*T2$", cn, value = TRUE)
  b_T3 <- grep("^phase.*T3$", cn, value = TRUE)
  if (length(b_T2) != 1L || length(b_T3) != 1L)
    stop("Could not locate unique phase coefficients: ", paste(cn, collapse=", "))

  L <- rep(0, length(b)); L[cn == b_T2] <- 1; L[cn == b_T3] <- -1
  est <- as.numeric(t(L) %*% b)
  se  <- sqrt(as.numeric(t(L) %*% V %*% L))
  pval <- 2 * pnorm(abs(est/se), lower.tail = FALSE)

  OR  <- exp(est); LCL <- exp(est - 1.96*se); UCL <- exp(est + 1.96*se)

  data.frame(
    Outcome  = outcome,
    Contrast = "T2 vs T3",
    OR       = round(OR, 2),
    LCL      = round(LCL, 2),
    UCL      = round(UCL, 2),
    `OR (95% CI)` = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f–%.2f)", round(OR,2), round(LCL,2), round(UCL,2)),
    p.value  = ifelse(pval < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", pval)),
    check.names = FALSE
  )
}

# working correlation to use
cor_to_use <- if (exists("best_cor")) best_cor else "exchangeable"

# ---------- OUTCOMES ----------
outcomes <- c("Affected", "Dyspnea", "Allergy")  # <--- CHANGED

res_list  <- lapply(outcomes, function(y) gee_pair_T2vsT3(y, corstr = cor_to_use))
res_pairs <- do.call(rbind, res_list)

cat("\nT2 vs T3 pairwise ORs (logit GEE, robust SE):\n")
print(res_pairs, row.names = FALSE)

```












############################################################
Heatwave Severity Scale
```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(multgee)
})

# 0) analysis frame (same as before)
d <- dat_long %>%
  mutate(
    phase_ord   = factor(phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = TRUE),
    phase_unord = factor(phase_ord, ordered = FALSE),
    y_ord = {
      y <- symptom_severity_score
      if (is.numeric(y) && min(y, na.rm = TRUE) == 0) y <- y + 1L
      factor(y, ordered = TRUE)
    }
  ) %>% tidyr::drop_na(ID, phase_ord, y_ord) %>% droplevels()

# 1) choose covariates that exist
covars_all <- c("Age_Group","Gender","Family_Size","Monthly_Income","HH_Area",
                "HTN_prior","Asthma_prior","Thyroid_prior","CVDs_prior")
covars_use <- intersect(covars_all, names(d))

# 2) fit ORDINAL GEE with covariates (unordered phase → T2/T3 vs T1)
fm_cov <- as.formula(paste("y_ord ~ phase_unord",
                           if (length(covars_use)) paste("+", paste(covars_use, collapse=" + ")) else ""))

fit_cov <- ordLORgee(
  formula  = fm_cov,
  data     = d,
  id       = d$ID,
  repeated = d$phase_ord,
  LORstr   = "uniform",
  add      = 0.5,
  link     = "logit"
)
cat("\n=== Ordinal GEE with covariates ===\n"); print(summary(fit_cov))

# 3) phase odds ratios (population-averaged)
ct <- coef(summary(fit_cov))
ph_rows <- grepl("^phase_unord", rownames(ct))
or_tab <- data.frame(
  term = rownames(ct)[ph_rows],
  logOR = ct[ph_rows,"Estimate"],
  SE    = ct[ph_rows,"san.se"],
  z     = ct[ph_rows,"san.z"],
  p     = ct[ph_rows,"Pr(>|san.z|)"],
  OR    = exp(ct[ph_rows,"Estimate"]),
  OR_L  = exp(ct[ph_rows,"Estimate"] - 1.96*ct[ph_rows,"san.se"]),
  OR_U  = exp(ct[ph_rows,"Estimate"] + 1.96*ct[ph_rows,"san.se"]),
  row.names = NULL
)
cat("\n=== Phase effects as Odds Ratios (adjusted) ===\n")
print(within(or_tab, {OR <- round(OR,3); OR_L <- round(OR_L,3); OR_U <- round(OR_U,3)}))

# 4) covariate-adjusted predicted probabilities by phase (marginal standardization)
#    logit P(Y<=k) = cut_k + x'β  → probs = diff( (0, plogis(cuts + x'β), 1) )

coefs <- coef(fit_cov)
cuts  <- coefs[grepl("^beta\\d+", names(coefs))]   # thresholds
beta  <- coefs[!grepl("^beta\\d+", names(coefs))]  # regression coeffs (no cuts)

# build a model matrix consistent with the fit (drops "(Intercept)" if present)
build_eta <- function(newdat) {
  X <- model.matrix(delete.response(terms(fm_cov)), data = newdat)
  X <- X[, colnames(X) %in% names(beta), drop = FALSE]
  # align columns to beta order, add missing columns as 0
  miss <- setdiff(names(beta), colnames(X))
  if (length(miss)) X <- cbind(X, matrix(0, nrow(X), length(miss),
                                         dimnames = list(NULL, miss)))
  X <- X[, names(beta), drop = FALSE]
  as.numeric(X %*% beta)
}

cumlogit_to_probs <- function(eta_vec, cuts) {
  # returns an n x K matrix of category probabilities
  cp <- plogis(matrix(cuts, nrow=length(eta_vec), ncol=length(cuts), byrow=TRUE) +
                 matrix(eta_vec, nrow=length(eta_vec), ncol=length(cuts)))
  cp <- cbind(0, cp, 1)
  t(apply(cp, 1, diff))
}

ph_levels <- c("T1","T2","T3")
pred_adj <- lapply(ph_levels, function(ph) {
  nd <- d %>% mutate(phase_unord = factor(ph, levels = ph_levels, ordered = FALSE))
  eta <- build_eta(nd)
  P   <- cumlogit_to_probs(eta, cuts)      # n x K
  colMeans(P)                              # average over sample → marginal probs
})

pred_tbl <- do.call(rbind, pred_adj)
colnames(pred_tbl) <- paste0("severity_", seq_len(ncol(pred_tbl))-1L)
pred_tbl <- data.frame(phase = ph_levels, round(pred_tbl, 3))
cat("\n=== Covariate-adjusted predicted probabilities by phase ===\n")
print(pred_tbl)

# 5) (optional) observed row % for reference
obs_tab <- with(dat_long, table(phase, symptom_severity_score))
cat("\n=== Observed row % (unadjusted) ===\n"); print(round(prop.table(obs_tab, 1)*100, 1))


```


```{r}
# Frequency table: Phase × Severity
tab <- table(dat_long$phase, dat_long$symptom_severity_score, useNA = "ifany")
tab

# Add row and column percentages
prop_row <- prop.table(tab, 1) * 100   # percentages within each phase
prop_col <- prop.table(tab, 2) * 100   # percentages within each severity level

cat("\n=== Counts ===\n")
print(tab)

cat("\n=== Row % (within phase) ===\n")
print(round(prop_row, 1))

cat("\n=== Column % (within severity) ===\n")
print(round(prop_col, 1))

```









```{r}
## ===== Ordinal GEE for Dust Storm Severity (population-averaged) =====
## Uses dat_long_ds with columns shown; creates new objects only.

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(multgee)
})

stopifnot(exists("dat_long_ds"))

# 0) Analysis frame (ordered phase + ordered outcome)
d_ds <- dat_long_ds %>%
  mutate(
    phase_ord   = factor(phase, levels = c("T1","T2","T3"), ordered = TRUE),
    phase_unord = factor(phase_ord, ordered = FALSE),
    y_ord = {
      y <- symptom_severity_score
      if (is.numeric(y) && min(y, na.rm = TRUE) == 0) y <- y + 1L  # ensure 1..J for multgee
      factor(y, ordered = TRUE)
    }
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(ID, phase_ord, y_ord) %>%
  droplevels()

# 1) Choose covariates that actually exist in your data
covars_all <- c(
  "Age_Group","Gender","Family_Size","Monthly_Income","HH_Area",
  "HTN_prior","Asthma_prior","Thyroid_prior","CVDs_prior"
)
covars_use <- intersect(covars_all, names(d_ds))

# 2) Fit ordinal GEE with covariates (unordered phase → T2/T3 vs T1)
fm_ds <- as.formula(paste(
  "y_ord ~ phase_unord",
  if (length(covars_use)) paste("+", paste(covars_use, collapse = " + ")) else ""
))

fit_ds <- ordLORgee(
  formula  = fm_ds,
  data     = d_ds,
  id       = d_ds$ID,
  repeated = d_ds$phase_ord,     # ordered index for correlation
  LORstr   = "uniform",
  add      = 0.5,
  link     = "logit"
)

cat("\n=== Ordinal GEE (Dust Storm) with covariates ===\n")
print(summary(fit_ds))

# 3) Phase effects as Odds Ratios (population-averaged) with 95% CI
ct <- coef(summary(fit_ds))
ph_rows <- grepl("^phase_unord", rownames(ct))
or_tab <- data.frame(
  term  = rownames(ct)[ph_rows],
  logOR = ct[ph_rows, "Estimate"],
  SE    = ct[ph_rows, "san.se"],
  z     = ct[ph_rows, "san.z"],
  p     = ct[ph_rows, "Pr(>|san.z|)"],
  OR    = exp(ct[ph_rows, "Estimate"]),
  OR_L  = exp(ct[ph_rows, "Estimate"] - 1.96 * ct[ph_rows, "san.se"]),
  OR_U  = exp(ct[ph_rows, "Estimate"] + 1.96 * ct[ph_rows, "san.se"]),
  row.names = NULL
) %>%
  mutate(across(c(OR, OR_L, OR_U), ~round(.x, 3)))

cat("\n=== Phase effects as Odds Ratios (adjusted, Dust Storm) ===\n")
print(or_tab)

# 4) Covariate-adjusted predicted probabilities by phase (marginal standardization)
#    logit P(Y<=k) = cut_k + X beta  → category probs = diff( (0, plogis(cuts + X beta), 1) )
coefs <- coef(fit_ds)
cuts  <- coefs[grepl("^beta\\d+", names(coefs))]   # thresholds
beta  <- coefs[!grepl("^beta\\d+", names(coefs))]  # regression coefficients (no cuts)

build_eta <- function(newdat) {
  X <- model.matrix(delete.response(terms(fm_ds)), data = newdat)
  X <- X[, colnames(X) %in% names(beta), drop = FALSE]
  miss <- setdiff(names(beta), colnames(X))
  if (length(miss)) {
    X <- cbind(X, matrix(0, nrow(X), length(miss), dimnames = list(NULL, miss)))
  }
  X <- X[, names(beta), drop = FALSE]
  as.numeric(X %*% beta)
}

cumlogit_to_probs <- function(eta_vec, cuts) {
  cp <- plogis(matrix(cuts, nrow = length(eta_vec), ncol = length(cuts), byrow = TRUE) +
                 matrix(eta_vec, nrow = length(eta_vec), ncol = length(cuts)))
  cp <- cbind(0, cp, 1)
  t(apply(cp, 1, diff))  # n x K
}

ph_levels <- c("T1","T2","T3")
pred_adj <- lapply(ph_levels, function(ph) {
  nd  <- d_ds %>% mutate(phase_unord = factor(ph, levels = ph_levels, ordered = FALSE))
  eta <- build_eta(nd)
  P   <- cumlogit_to_probs(eta, cuts)  # n x K
  colMeans(P)                          # marginalize over sample covariates
})
pred_tbl <- data.frame(phase = ph_levels, do.call(rbind, pred_adj))
colnames(pred_tbl)[-1] <- paste0("severity_", seq_len(ncol(pred_tbl) - 1))
pred_tbl <- pred_tbl %>% mutate(across(-phase, ~round(.x, 3)))

cat("\n=== Covariate-adjusted predicted probabilities by phase (Dust Storm) ===\n")
print(pred_tbl)

# 5) (Optional) Observed row % for reference (unadjusted)
obs_tab <- with(dat_long_ds, table(phase, symptom_severity_score))
cat("\n=== Observed row % (unadjusted, Dust Storm) ===\n")
print(round(prop.table(obs_tab, 1) * 100, 1))

```
